programme.desc: Nora takes her first steps toward financial independence, trying her hand at a couple jobs in an attempt to move out of her dad's house.

programme.title: South Park: Cartman's Silly Hate Crime 2000
programme.desc: Cartman is pursued by the FBI for committing a hate crime against Token and lands in juvenile hall.

programme.title: South Park: Go God Go
programme.desc: Things go horribly wrong when Cartman plans to propel himself into the future. South Park Elementary School is facing strong opposition to the topic of evolution being taught to the fourth graders, especially from Mr. Garrison who must teach it.

programme.title: South Park: Go God Go XII
programme.desc: After freezing himself in an attempt to make his three-week wait for a Nintendo Wii pass quickly, Cartman lands himself over 500 years in the future. Stuck in a tumultuous place with warring factions and angry sea otters, Cartman fights to return home.

programme.title: South Park: Chinpoko Mon
programme.desc: Stan, Kyle, Cartman and Kenny are caught up in the latest fad from Japan: Chinpoko Mon. Little do they know, they are being brainwashed by the Japanese to once again bomb Pearl Harbor.

programme.title: South Park: Ginger Cow
programme.desc: Cartman's latest prank brings peace to the world.

programme.title: South Park: The F Word
programme.desc: The boys fight back against the loud and obnoxious motorcycle riders that are disrupting everyone's peace in South Park.

programme.title: South Park: Osama Bin Laden Has Farty Pants
programme.desc: The kids of South Park have raised money to send to children of Afghanistan, but the Government believes the Afghani children's thank you gift is contaminated with Anthrax and the boys are forced to take it back to Afghanistan.

programme.title: South Park: The Jeffersons
programme.desc: The children of South Park are drawn to 'Mr. Jefferson,' the new neighbour in town, and Cartman goes out of his way to get 'Mr. Jefferson' to love him best.

programme.title: South Park: Whale Whores
programme.desc: Stan takes action to stop the Japanese from killing the world's whales and dolphins.

programme.desc: Solutions for your home's air and water systems.

programme.title: The Closer: Red Tape
programme.desc: Sgt. Gabriel shoots a murder suspect he is certain is armed and firing at him, but the evidence doesn't seem to match up. A Force Investigator is sent in to check things out, interfering with Brenda's murder investigation.

programme.title: The Closer: Walking Back the Cat
programme.desc: Brenda and her squad are temporarily deputized into the FBI when a missing persons case turns into a full-blown murder investigation involving drug trafficking at gay dance parties.

programme.title: The Closer: Half Load
programme.desc: The team investigates the murder of a former gangbanger that may not have been the target.

programme.title: The Closer: Tapped Out
programme.desc: Brenda's team investigates the shooting death of a popular online 'hook-up king.'

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: Bring the Pain
programme.desc: Meredith and Dr. Shepherd have to use more than medicine when a young woman's traditionalist, religious father forbids her to have a life-saving operation. Meanwhile, George and Alex are forced to perform surgery under less than ideal conditions.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: Into You Like a Train
programme.desc: As Meredith awaits a decision from Derek, her angst is interrupted when a train crash brings injured patients to the hospital. When Addison Shepherd notes Izzie's potential, Izzie must choose between professional gain and her friendship with Meredith.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: Something to Talk About
programme.desc: Cristina, Izzie and Meredith pursue the case of Shane, a male patient who seems to have a hysterical pregnancy, which fascinates them and the entire medical staff. Elsewhere, a young patient inspires Alex to better express his feelings for Izzie.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: Let It Be
programme.desc: Derek and Addison Shepherd's professional relationship is challenged when their closest friends come to the hospital seeking a pre-emptive operation to avoid breast and ovarian cancer. George can't understand why a patient is unhappy to survive a fall.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cold Storage
programme.desc: Tracy Jo Shine grew up in a middle-class home in Houston, Texas. Unfortunately, when she attended a prestigious high school she began experimenting with drugs. When she went missing, her family suspected her new friends from school.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Web of Seduction
programme.desc: When the scene of a murder proves to be completely bare of evidence, computer forensics experts manage to dig up files on the victim's computer, and those of his wife and her lover that finger a suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Matrimony
programme.desc: A young woman claims to need some time away on her own. After 20 years go by, her family begins to believe they will never know what happened to her, until one day they receive a phone call that will alter everything.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Runaway Love
programme.desc: A woman is found floating in the harbor of an upscale yacht club, stabbed more than 50 times, and her ex-husband and daughter are missing. Investigators turn to forensic science to determine if they’re searching for victims... or perpetrators.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Window Watcher
programme.desc: Evidence at the scene supported a woman's seemingly farfetched story that a man wearing only underwear and gloves broke into the house, stabbed her boyfriend to death, and raped and terrorized her for hours afterwards.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Time Will Tell
programme.desc: A Canadian financier assumes the name of a co-worker as part of a money-laundering scheme. The man turns up dead in the ocean, with an anchor tied around his torso.

programme.title: Forensic Files: News at 11
programme.desc: Authorities believe that the death of a news anchor is the result of a tragically overzealous fan, but when a police dog tracks the killer back to the crime scene, officers are forced to include the crowd of onlookers in their list of suspects.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Strong Impressions
programme.desc: The wife of an Air Force officer is found dead in her bed, and authorities initially believe the cause of death to be accidental suffocation by a laundry bag, but further forensic investigation reveals the horrifying truth.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Disrobed
programme.desc: A married couple was found shot to death in their suburban home. Investigators thought they had pin-pointed the killer and his motive until trash revealed the shocking truth and the true killer's identity.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dirty Little Seacret
programme.desc: A couple spent Memorial Day weekend at the beach, and then they simply vanished. A week later, police would get an unexpected lead from a robbery in progress, and the evidence they found helped solve a crime of unparalleled violence and brutality.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Coworkers: Lies, Cameras and Lingerie
programme.desc: When the entrepreneurial spirit turns two best friends into mortal enemies, one woman goes on the run.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Coworkers: Bloodshed in the Barn
programme.desc: Not long after taking a new job, beloved horse-trainer Fiona Southwell is found brutally murdered in a rural stable, and a small seaside town in Northern England must find the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Whodunit
programme.desc: An evening out to a murder mystery theatre turns into a real life whodunit.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Profiles of intriguing crimes, accidents and outbreaks of disease from around the world are examined.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Death Play
programme.desc: Marie Robard's character in her high school's play 'Hamlet' hinted at her own inner turmoil.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Buddhist Monk Murders
programme.desc: Several monks are found massacred at a Buddhist temple.

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Footpath Murders
programme.desc: British detectives teamed up with a pioneering scientist to crack a case of sexual assault and serial murder. This 1986 case marked the first time DNA was used as evidence in a court of law.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Planted Evidence
programme.desc: A woman is found beaten, bound, strangled and possibly raped outside of Phoenix. The nearby plants tell investigators more about the killer than any other single piece of evidence.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Southside Strangler
programme.desc: Learn how investigators caught Timothy Wilson Spencer, better known as the Southside Strangler, a serial killer responsible for the murders of five women in Virginia. This was the first use of DNA profiling in the U.S. justice system.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Legionnaires' Disease
programme.desc: History was made in Philadelphia in the summer of 1976 -- not because of the bicentennial, but because of the mysterious death of 34 Legionnaires.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Squire's Riches
programme.desc: A man perishes in a fire while working inside his garage. Initially, the coroner rules the death an accident. But a Forensic Odontologist changes the direction of the case, as police unravel a bizarre case of stolen identity.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Home of the Brave
programme.desc: When their trailer catches fire, the young husband heroically rescues his wife and infant son. A month later, his wife is beaten to death in a bedroom of his parents' home. The cut window screen points to an intruder, but there is a lack of evidence.

programme.title: Who Will Write Our History
programme.desc: Who Will Write Our History tells the story of a clandestine group of journalists, scholars, and activists in the Warsaw Ghetto who created a secret, buried archive so that truth would survive, even if they did not.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Alone: Gary of the Jungle
programme.desc: All-star survivalist and wildcard Gary Golding takes on a jungle for the first time completely alone in Belize. Without a partner, Gary forms a bond with a turtle he names Timmy but a deep cut and dangerous infection threaten Gary's challenge.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Alone: Man Up or Bow Out
programme.desc: Trying to survive 21 days completely solo, All-Star survivalist Luke McLaughlin takes on the dangerous badlands of South Africa. Stalked by ferocious lions and hyenas, Luke must get a kill if he has a chance to finish the challenge.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Uncensored: Alone: Hunted and Haunted
programme.desc: With extra footage and bonus scenes: All-star survivalist Lacey is pushed to a breaking point as she struggles to take on the African bush while battling sleep deprivation.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Ryan's Journey
programme.desc: Deep in the swamp Ryan hunts an alligator alone. In South Africa, lions stalk but another threat proves more dangerous. In Bermuda, he competes with sharks. Ryan adds insights to his challenges and preps for his biggest one yet: 21 days alone in Africa.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Alone: Blazed and Confused
programme.desc: Desperate for a kill on the African savannah, All-Star survivalist Ryan Holt risks his safety to get in position in for a better shot. A fire in his shelter could take Ryan out of the challenge.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: The Jungle Curse
programme.desc: Two naked survivalists are challenged to survive for 21 days in the Costa Rican rainforest.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Ryan's Journey
programme.desc: Deep in the swamp Ryan hunts an alligator alone. In South Africa, lions stalk but another threat proves more dangerous. In Bermuda, he competes with sharks. Ryan adds insights to his challenges and preps for his biggest one yet: 21 days alone in Africa.

programme.desc: Desperate for a kill on the African savannah, All-Star survivalist Ryan Holt risks his safety to get in position in for a better shot. A fire in his shelter could take Ryan out of the challenge.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Easier Said Than Done
programme.desc: After a nation-wide search, two lucky fans were selected to take on a special 14-day survival challenge. A nurturing mother and an independent adventurer try to survive in the rainforests of Nicaragua.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Chopped Cabriolet and 'Vette Rescue
programme.desc: The crew helps a widow by buying her husband's Ford '32 Cabriolet and many hot rod projects. They rescue an heirloom '62 Corvette from a garage falling down around it, but not all the family is pleased Richard has it. Richard makes a big announcement.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Cool Customline
programme.desc: KC's beloved but broken down '55 Ford Customline gets new life and Richard needs to flip it to Shark Tank's Mark Cuban. George Foreman takes off with Richard's prize Mustang while Richard and Dennis haggle with a WWII vet over a '38 Aston Martin.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Germany Meet America
programme.desc: While Richard heads off to make the steal of a lifetime on four rare Mustangs, Aaron and the Monkeys fight to finish their junkyard Porsche in time for their big race against Richard's new $200,000 Porsche Turbo S.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Pickup the Pieces
programme.desc: Richard and Aaron's goal of turning an old '49 Chevy pickup into a show-quality truck comes down to the wire as they race to finish it in time to debut at the Lone Star Throwdown.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Supping Up a Super Ford GT, Part II
programme.desc: As work on the smashed up 2005 Ford GT continues, Richard heads to Indiana to try to sell a Shelby Cobra prop car used in the superhero movie 'Iron Man.'

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Crusin' for a Bruisin'
programme.desc: As the Monkeys race to finish their first big build without Aaron, Richard tries to unload his '65 Shelby Mustang GT with a frozen engine.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Memphis: Bet on Memphis
programme.desc: JJ's Arm Drop in Las Vegas continues. Memphis lines up against each other for the $30,000 prize.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Memphis: Bad Boyz For Life
programme.desc: The Memphis family meets up with another group of Memphis racers, the 901 Bad Boyz, for a night of grudge racing.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Memphis: Full Throttle: Big Brawls
programme.desc: Memphis starts the racing season against a friendly group of racers from Illinois, but after just 3 races, rain comes and ends the night. JJ sets up another race night with a group from Detroit, but this group isn't quite as friendly.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Memphis: Memphis vs. The Rock City
programme.desc: Memphis continues their race night against the loudmouth group from Detroit. They make an unusual bet that whichever city is first to win 7 races, wins the total bets from all the races. It's risky, but if they can pull it off, they'll end up with $20000.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Memphis: Needing Dough
programme.desc: A group of racers from Indiana come to race the Memphis family, but when they aren't honest about tire size in order to get a race, JJ has to keep his son calm and collected. Plus, Kenneth Gulley is back racing after a catastrophic crash.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Memphis: NO-HIO
programme.desc: Memphis heads to Ohio to meet up with a group who's got flashy cars and deep pockets.

programme.title: My Feet Are Killing Me: Mo Toes, Mo Problems

programme.desc: Blake and Jasmin argue on a night out. Mike returns to Washington. Emily and Betsy shop for a wedding dress. Michael's family confront Angela about their wedding. Tania's revelation pushes Syngin away. It's Michael and Juliana's wedding day.

programme.title: What Not to Wear: Becca
programme.desc: For someone who works with cupcakes and confections all day, there is nothing sweet about Becca's clothes.

programme.title: What Not to Wear: Jessica
programme.desc: An executive assistant's wardrobe style is holding her back from getting a promotion.

programme.title: Secretly Pregnant: Sandra/ Dannielle
programme.desc: Sandra's grown daughters disapprove of her boyfriend, and news of her pregnancy could destroy their relationship. Dannielle risks her relationship with and support from her grandfather if he discovers she is pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Secretly Pregnant: Carmen/ Jerline
programme.desc: Carmen is a struggling single mother unexpectedly pregnant with her second baby. Jerline and her husband are unemployed and living with her mother while trying to get their lives together.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Popping Popeye
programme.desc: Lisa has a horn growing out of the back of her head and fears that it could be cancer. Victor has a bulbous lump on the middle of his chest. Chuck has a Popeye-shaped bump on his arm. Christian and Jonathan are teenage brothers with matching lumps.

programme.desc: Ronen's mysterious lump above his knee is one of the largest Dr. Lee has ever seen. Amber suffers from a debilitating skin disease that no one understands. Sandy has a neck lump she calls Tommy. Kristy's eyelid cyst is ruining her life.

programme.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive: She's Going to Jail
programme.desc: Joanne's hoarding is so extreme that the city has already sent her to jail four times.

programme.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive: You're Gonna Die in Here
programme.desc: Once a respected high school principal, Wayne's life changed when he was the target of a thwarted school shooting. Now paralyzed by PTSD and compulsive hoarding, Wayne has virtually barricaded himself inside his home and in turn has abandoned his family.

programme.title: 1000-lb Sisters: Breaking Point
programme.desc: Amy and Tammy eagerly begin their weight loss journey. Sticking to their diets is a matter of life or death but proves to be a real struggle. The pressure to reach their goals culminates in a huge fight that threatens their diets and relationship.

programme.title: 1000-lb Sisters: A House Divided
programme.desc: After a stressful first month of dieting, the sisters head back to Atlanta for their one-month check in with Dr. Procter to find out if they are on the right path to their weight goals. The results force Amy to make a difficult decision.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Dumbbell
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr test their parental instincts by reading their daughters' diaries, then give presentations that are anything but normal. Later, tonight's big loser gets painfully honest with bodybuilders at the gym.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Eggman
programme.desc: Joe, Q, Sal and Murr go incognito to fool unsuspecting strangers, then pop in for a coffee just in time to miss out on a big prize. Plus, tonight's big loser might just crack under the pressure of his rotten punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Cake Loss
programme.desc: Q, Sal, Murr and Joe mean no disrespect to patrons at a food court, then cut to the chase while posing as tailors. Later, strangers pick sides in a wild debate, and tonight's big loser takes the cake with his crumby punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Antisocial Network
programme.desc: Sal, Murr, Joe and Q play matchmakers at the food court, then switch fields to pose as architects, sharing some perplexing new building technology. Plus, tonight's big loser makes a connection while networking, and won't let go.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Off the Reservation
programme.desc: Murr, Q, Joe and Sal participate in a fake documentary, then find themselves in the middle of a marshmallow throwing contest. Plus, tonight's big loser is the host with the least when he can't find customers' dinner reservations.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Fraudway
programme.desc: Q, Joe, Sal and Murr one-up each other while trying not to laugh, and team up for a lunch that’s for the birds. Later, tonight’s big loser hits the Broadway stage, where he’s treated to a classic New York welcome by an agitated crowd.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Show Stopper
programme.desc: Sal, Q, Joe and Murr are at Universal Studios in Hollywood. They start off serving up ridiculous surveys, then make things awkward while posing as maintenance workers. Plus, tonight’s big loser can't catch a break…no matter how many times he tries.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Sucks for You
programme.desc: Sal, Q, Joe and Murr bus their way through Katz’s Deli, then express some unpopular opinions at the park. Plus, tonight’s big loser must talk his way through some real highs and lows, in a punishment that truly sucks.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Well...
programme.desc: Q, Sal, Joe and Murr play a game of tag at a coffee shop, then convince shoppers to deliver sketchy messages at the grocery store. Plus, tonight's big loser might lose his mind in Impractical Jokers' first-ever non-punishment punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Prize Fighter
programme.desc: The guys get their checks bounced by customers who notice unusual charges, then help out coworkers with some peculiar trust exercises. Later, the big loser finds himself deep at a carnival game that's rigged for him to lose.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Card Against Humanity
programme.desc: Find out which Jokers really wear glasses, how Q was injured the last time he wore his talking brush disguise and what Sal's sole business card actually says.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Bull Shiatsu
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes to find out what word Joe uses as slang for cash, which prop did Q have to handle with care and how Joe managed to keep cool during his chair punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Running of the Bullies
programme.desc: Find out which Joker's waiter experience made meal or no meal a breeze, why there was a white noise machine needed during dust bunnies and who issued a siren warning right after Sal's pool punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Needy and the Greedy
programme.desc: A behind the scenes look at the location that refused to let the Jokers film, Joe's injury from being thrown into a tower of cereal and why Q was called a 'loose cannon'.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Inside Carbonaro: The Framing Canon
programme.desc: Find out which magic team member knows how to ride a unicycle, what trick almost used an alpaca and which trick nearly resulted in Michael slicing open his neck.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Inside Carbonaro: A Positive Presence
programme.desc: Learn which trick Michael has been performing since he was a child, who embarked on a 21-day juice diet cleanse and what moment had everyone on set erupting with laughter.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Inside Carbonaro: A Living Trilobite
programme.desc: Find out which trick went viral on a hip-hop blog, what word is hard for Michael to pronounce and what degree Michael earned in college.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Inside Carbonaro: Might Be Trippin'
programme.desc: Find out which trick nearly wounded a delivery man, what illusion is difficult for even skilled magicians to pull off and why fans speculated the show was connected to the illuminati.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins the Hospital
programme.desc: Inflated hospital costs have created an unfair system, reckless antibiotic prescriptions makes them worthless, and you might not need a mammogram.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins College
programme.desc: Adam shares why becoming a dropout billionaire is unlikely and how school rankings have little to do with education quality. Plus, student loans.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Emily Ruins Adam
programme.desc: Emily takes over to ruin Adam, debunking IQ tests and pointing out information Adam has gotten wrong in the past. Plus, she explains the backfire effect.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins His Vacation
programme.desc: Adam Conover and his girlfriend take a journey across America, where he reveals that Mount Rushmore was built on stolen Native American land, Vegas slot machines are purposely designed to be addicting, and a whole lot more.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins the Suburbs
programme.desc: Adam explains that your lawn is an unnatural monstrosity, suburban design is killing you, and the racist past of suburbs led to segregation in schools.

programme.desc: At Amy's intricately planned Thanksgiving dinner, Jake goes 'full Santiago' (binder and all) in order to impress her father, a former cop. With Jake and Amy's focus elsewhere, Charles is left on turkey duty.

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine: Capt. Latvia
programme.desc: Charles enlists Jake's help in tracking down his son's favourite toy for Christmas, and the pair finds themselves accidentally facing off against a Latvian criminal ring as a result.

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine: The Fugitive Pt.1

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine: The Fugitive Pt. 2
programme.desc: Meanwhile, Jake and Amy place a bet on who can bring in the most escaped convicts and the loser has to move into the winner’s apartment. Then, with only one fugitive still on the loose, Jake enlists a surprising ally.

programme.desc: A guy with a rogue beer slingshot, a grown man losing a battle with a piñata, Filipino friends freaking out over Miss Universe and more.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: There's Life in Here

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Shock on the Bay
programme.desc: On the Gulf, hundreds of sea turtles face death during a cold spell. A tip leads to a raid on a deer poacher in central Texas. Wardens crack down on white-tailed deer hunters throughout the state, but in Southwest Texas, mule deer season is in full swing.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Justice Served
programme.desc: Game Wardens stay busy patrolling all over the state of Texas. On Lake Sam Rayburn, a water patrol turns into a cry for help. The wardens serve a warrant to a man who illegally shot a hog. A drug arrest leads a game warden into a manhunt.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Seeing Stars and Stripes
programme.desc: It's summertime in Texas. Game Wardens handle a speeding jet ski, drunk boaters, angry campers, and a rowdy raccoon.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Bucks Collide
programme.desc: Game wardens head to a home after getting a call about bucks fighting in Comal County. While patrolling the Brazos River, Kiel responds to a drowning in progress. A trespassing incident quickly turns into a drug case. Putnam hears shots fired nearby.

programme.title: Puppy Bowl: Inside the Bowl: The First Ever Double Touchdown
programme.desc: We're recounting the greatest moments from all the furry-ious years of puppies at play.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Sparks Flying
programme.desc: During the holiday weekend a jet skier is reported missing, while another is caught without a life vest. Warden Kiel witnesses a fist fight during the fireworks, and warden Cummings handles underage drinkers.

programme.title: Coyote Peterson: Brave the Wild: Sneak Peek
programme.desc: Follow animal expert and adventurer Coyote Peterson around the world as he gets up-close to the most fascinating creatures. He uncovers the secrets of animals we often misunderstand. Every animal has a story to tell and Coyote braves the wild to tell it.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Liars and Trespassers
programme.desc: Game Warden McGee rushes to a domestic altercation. Game Wardens Zuniga and Roel run into trespassers, while Provasnik inspects a potentially stolen jet ski. Game Wardens Richards and McGee team up on an investigation, and a baby squirrel is rescued.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Heroes of East Texas
programme.desc: In a special episode of Lone Star Law, the best that east Texas has to offer is showcased. Whether it's wrangling a gator, rescuing baby hawks, or solving a hunting case, the game wardens in east Texas are always tackling something.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Lying Dogs
programme.desc: The Game Wardens patrol the beach, lake and land, as summer is in full swing. Wardens educate a dog owner about leaving pets in the sun. An under-age drinker tells too many lies. Wardens inspect novice jet skiers on a busy recreational lake.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Liars and Trespassers
programme.desc: Game Warden McGee rushes to a domestic altercation. Game Wardens Zuniga and Roel run into trespassers, while Provasnik inspects a potentially stolen jet ski. Game Wardens Richards and McGee team up on an investigation, and a baby squirrel is rescued.

programme.title: The Crocodile Hunter: Island of Time
programme.desc: Cameras capture the natural behaviour of dolphins at play. Also, gaze upon magnificent tropical fish near the Island of Time, just south of the Great Barrier Reef. Terri films the mating rituals of green water turtles.

programme.title: My Cat From Hell: Scary Tails
programme.desc: Jackson works with a cat, Skylar, who's literally afraid of her tail. Then, he meets a pair of guardians whose cat is constantly knocking things over, climbing up the window screens and spontaneously attacking. Finally, a disabled cat inspires people.

programme.title: Dr. Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet: He's Ours Now
programme.desc: When a young Boxer falls from a 2nd story window, the team races to the rescue. Dr. Jeff discovers a life-threatening problem in a Great Dane. And, after a beloved cat is attacked by a mystery animal at night, Dr. Don battles to save his leg.

programme.title: The Vet Life: Hello Houston
programme.desc: Houston welcomes veterinarians Dr. Blue, Dr. Ross and Dr. Lavigne. With cases ranging from risky surgeries to diagnosing hungry chameleons, their hands are full. A car accident brings the practice to a halt as one of the doctors faces a long recovery.

programme.title: Too Cute!: Puppies and a Piggy
programme.desc: Goldendoodles take over the house, 12 of them, and later, batch of Swiss Mountain pups take a while to find their stride.

programme.title: Puppy Bowl: Inside the Bowl: Puppy Bowl's Best Nappers
programme.desc: We're recounting the greatest moments from all the furry-ious years of puppies at play.

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins: Big Day for Baby Rhino
programme.desc: Terri helps prepare the zoo's new baby rhino to receive a lifesaving vaccine. Robert is on a rescue mission to save two black swans in very bad shape. Bindi tries to determine if a cranky wombat named Poa might be pregnant.

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo: Baby Porcupine on the Loose!
programme.desc: Porcupines Roxie and Henning have had a new baby porcupette, but living alongside eleven meerkats means that the new arrival will need to stay calm. Also, when he finally plucks up the courage to face the mob, he ends up on an unexpected adventure.

programme.title: The Zoo: A Gorilla with Heart
programme.desc: Surgery on a silverback gorilla's broken canine reveals a more serious medical issue. Love may be in the air for two birds of paradise, Glory and Holiday. And, dozens of venomous tarantulas keep the staff on their toes.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Golden Girl
programme.desc: Mariah faces a challenging rescue when she realizes the dog in danger is deaf. Former adopters come back to Villalobos set on adopting a special needs dog. And the rescue struggles to track down a dog's owner because of outdated microchip information.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Pressure Cooker
programme.desc: Villalobos faces one of their most challenging rescues when a house fire reveals a massive dog-hoarding situation. Two teachers fall in love with a deaf puppy they hope to give a forever home.

programme.title: Movie: Meet the Browns
programme.desc: After years of trying to make ends meet, a single mother of three finds out that the father she's never known has passed away. She decides to go to the funeral in hopes of getting to know a part of her family she never knew existed.

programme.title: Movie: The Best Man Holiday
programme.desc: Old rivalries and old flames are rekindled when a group of college friends reunite at Christmas, after 15 years.

programme.title: Movie: The Single Moms Club

programme.title: The Parkers: Internship

programme.title: The Parkers: She's a Bad Mamma Jamma
programme.desc: The son of Prof. Oglevee's widowed friend decides he wants Nikki to be his new mom.

programme.title: The Parkers: Squatter's Rights
programme.desc: Nikki is thrilled when Professor Oglevee must move in with her after he goes broke.

programme.title: Movie: White House Down
programme.desc: A man recently denied his dream job of protecting the President of the United States ironically finds himself in the middle of chaos as he struggles to save his daughter, the president and the rest of the country.

programme.title: Movie: Arsenal
programme.desc: A Southern mobster attempts to rescue his kidnapped brother from the grasp of a vicious criminal holding him hostage.

programme.title: Movie: The Hitman's Bodyguard
programme.desc: A notorious hitman who is set to testify against a ruthless dictator becomes targeted by his goons and assassins. In order to stay alive and make it to The Hague he has to team up with the government aged who's been a thorn in his side for years.

programme.title: Movie: xXx: Return of Xander Cage
programme.desc: The government tracks down extreme athlete Xander Cage, long presumed dead, to fight a dangerous new foe. They must race to recover an unstoppable weapon known as Pandora's Box. Along with a new team, Xander takes on his most powerful foe yet.

programme.title: Movie: Troy
programme.desc: In 1193 BCE, war erupts between the kingdoms of Greece and Troy when Helen, Queen of Sparta, falls in love with Prince Paris of Troy and leaves her husband, Menelaus, for him.

programme.title: Movie: Urge
programme.desc: A group of friends take vacation at an island paradise. They meet a nightclub owner who offers them a drug called Urge. Getting hooked, they take way more than they should and the vacation turns deadly as the island deteriorates into a madhouse.

programme.title: Movie: Arrival
programme.desc: When mysterious spacecraft touch down across the globe, expert linguist Louise Banks is brought to communicate with the aliens. Leading her own specialised team, she begins to understand the alien language. When tensions explode, she must prevent a war.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Printer's Devil
programme.desc: A reporter promises to save a newspaper by fabricating events and then making them happen.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Parallel

programme.title: Love It or List It: All Work and No Play

programme.desc: See Mike Holmes and the next generation help a single homeowner who's struggling with an older house. She's too proud to ask for help, so Mike and the family step in to assist with maintenance issues and improve her curb appeal.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Abandoned Kitchen
programme.desc: See Mike Holmes and the next generation help a family complete their kitchen so they can finally sell their home and relocate. A contractor proved to be unreliable and left the project unfinished, so now Mike and the family step in to tackle the job.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: A Heritage Concern
programme.desc: See Mike Holmes and the next generation take on a family's heritage home with numerous issues. A contractor guaranteed the house had been updated, but three years later, they're still encountering problems and need to make the place safe again.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Fan Faves: Unfinished Business
programme.desc: Mike and the crew start a new home that was left half-finished by a contractor and find tons of problems behind the walls. Michael and designer Kimm go shopping for flooring with some furry friends, and Sherry and Cali take baby steps getting to work.

programme.title: Good Bones: Mom and Daughter Duo Renovate Neighborhoods One House at a Time
programme.desc: Mina and Karen have renovated close to twenty homes in their downtown adjacent community, Fountain Square. They have hand selected their neighbours and raised property values resulting in their dream community.

programme.title: Good Bones: Tiny House, Huge Transformation
programme.desc: A very small house poses big problems for Mina and Karen.

programme.title: Good Bones: Facelift for a Tiny Victorian
programme.desc: Mina and Karen buy a tiny, Victorian-style home in need of a serious facelift. Not only is the house small, it has a funky layout with non-functional spaces, forcing the girls to build an addition on the back while trying to stay on budget.

programme.title: Good Bones: Historical Hot Mess
programme.desc: Mina and Karen splurged on a corner lot home in the historical neighborhood of Fletcher Place. While struggling to work within the guidelines of the Historical Preservation Commission, Mina and Karen face more problems than they anticipated.

programme.title: Good Bones: Risky Reno With Historic Charm
programme.desc: Despite its odd layout and decrepit state, Mina and Karen are taking on an old house with a ton of historic charm in the Old Southside neighborhood. As framing starts, the crew uncovers a major structural problem that hits the budget hard.

programme.title: Good Bones: A Stately House on Sanders
programme.desc: Mina and Karen are taking on a 2,800-square-foot home with four bedrooms and two bathrooms. While the three-story home is structurally sound, it needs a lot of work to make it ready to sell. Tensions flare when the women have a difference in design style.

programme.title: Good Bones: Big Money in Fountain Square
programme.desc: Mina and Karen take on a massive, partially-constructed house that was abandoned by investors. Mina decides to take a risk with her own money, which could be the move that sells the house or leaves them over budget.

programme.title: Expedition Bigfoot: Did You Hear That?
programme.desc: With one team member down, Russell and Mireya head back into the forest to hunt down their leads. Their intense investigation uncovers their first pieces of possible Bigfoot evidence.

programme.title: Expedition Bigfoot: The Nest
programme.desc: Russell stumbles upon a structure he believes is a Bigfoot nest. Ronny and Mireya race to the nest to collect DNA samples that could break open their investigation.

programme.title: Expedition Bigfoot: Red Eyes at Night
programme.desc: Mireya and Ronny make a powerful discovery in the area surrounding the nest. When Russell suddenly falls ill, Bryce tests the theory that Bigfoot can render humans sick by emoting infrasound and is doing this to keep the team out of its territory.

programme.title: Expedition Bigfoot: Human Bait
programme.desc: The team plants tiny trackers around the clearing hoping they will cling to Bigfoot's fur. Mireya and Ronny return to where they heard whistles and saw glowing eyes. This time they have a plan: Mireya agrees to be bait in order to lure out Bigfoot.

programme.title: Expedition Bigfoot: The Forest Is Watching
programme.desc: The team discovers they're not alone after a mysterious heat signature is caught on camera. Russell investigates a possible Bigfoot underwater passageway, while Mireya and Ronny make a morbid discovery in the forest.

programme.title: Expedition Bigfoot: The Final Hours

programme.title: Below Deck: Shame Cocoon
programme.desc: Tyler asks out Rhylee on a date, Ashton and Laura's relationship grows stronger after their initial hiccups. The My Seanna crew welcomes the final Charter, who turns out to be more demanding than they had anticipated.

programme.title: Below Deck: Au Revior!
programme.desc: Adrian gets frustrated when his plan for a centerpiece filled with living sea creatures is nixed by Kate, Rhylee feels awkward around Tyler, while Laura and Ashton make plans for the future. The crew scrambles when Kate forgets the primary's birthday.

programme.title: Below Deck: Exodus
programme.desc: The crew including Captain Lee are shocked to wake up and hear the shocking news that Kate quit. In Kate's absence, Simone and Courtney struggle to maintain order in the interior. Ashton doesn't remember his actions from the night before.

programme.title: Below Deck: Witch Hunt
programme.desc: Kevin spirals out in response to charter guest, and professional chef, Justine telling him to 'step it up.' Much to Ashton's dismay, Kate returns and interferes in the deck team's drama. Simone sets out to become a better Second Stew.

programme.title: Below Deck: Public Displays of Affection
programme.desc: Alexis Bellino and her new beau come aboard the Valor to celebrate her recent divorce. After the deck team deals with major issues, Lee comes to a decision about Rhylee's future, forcing Ashton to change his management style.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of New Jersey: Clearing the Heir

programme.desc: Motor yacht Sirocco braces for its most exclusive charter guest yet: The Queen of Versailles. João faces his old demons after a drunken night out as well as an increasingly defiant deck crew. A new third stew joins the boat who has Colin swooning.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: What Eze the Problem?
programme.desc: Hannah and Joao have a miscommunication over a guest excursion. In the galley, Anastasia is forced to prepare foods that go against her vegan lifestyle to please the charter guest, the 'Queen of Versailles.' June continues to struggle to impress Hannah.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: A Whole Different Ball Game

programme.desc: Captain Sandy continues her on-going battle with Sirocco's anchors, while Joao and Travis continue their deep dive to set the anchors free. Baseball star Johnny Damon and his family and friends deal with bad weather and a feisty yacht owner.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Don't Cry for Me, Sirocco

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: It's Ben a Long Time
programme.desc: Colin faces a tough decision and Anastasia accepts her new role, but Sandy wonders if she's now phoning her job in. An all-female group come on board and do their best to flirt with the deck crew. Jack and Aesha move in together.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Holy Ship!

programme.desc: When a man is murdered by a small drone, the team discovers his connection to a terrorist group that is planning another local attack. With time running short, Nell must use her drone expertise to try to divert a disaster in Long Beach.

programme.title: Black-ish: The Talk
programme.desc: Dre, disappointed that Bow has already given Andre Jr. 'the talk' because she thinks he's too big of a prude to do it, decides to rectify matters by giving his son his version of 'the talk.'

programme.title: Black-ish: The Nod
programme.desc: Dre sets out to expand Andre Jr's social circle to include more black kids after he discovers Andre Jr. is clueless about 'the nod.' Meanwhile, hoping to inspire little Diane to become a doctor, Rainbow takes her to work at the hospital.

programme.title: Black-ish: Crazy Mom
programme.desc: When Dre agrees to take over Rainbow's 'mom' duties for a week, the overwhelming praise he gets from everyone at his kids’ school goes to his head. He soon finds himself pushing the envelope to outdo everyone, even the school's 'crazy mom.'

programme.title: Black-ish: Crime and Punishment
programme.desc: Although Dre and Rainbow agreed they would no longer spank their kids, all bets might be off when Jack disobeys. Now, Zoey, Junior, Diane and a nervous Jack are afraid that their parents will go back on their word.

programme.title: Movie: The Emoji Movie
programme.desc: An emoji born with multiple expressions sets out on a dangerous journey with his friends to find the code that will let him become a normal, single-expression emoji before the phone's owner can reset its software and destroy their city of Textopolis.

programme.title: The 2000s: A New Reality: End of Innocence
programme.desc: The 2000s begin with the threat of anthrax letters in America and the crash of the Concorde in France. Take a look at what led to the decision to invade Iraq and its aftermath. Plus, a look at the rise of video special effects in movies and video games.

programme.title: The 2000s: A New Reality: Things Get Real
programme.desc: Topics include: the launch of the iPhone; the birth of social media; Michael Jackson's death; US troops deployed to Iraq; the housing bubble swells and then bursts; Lehman brothers fails and the global financial crash is triggered; man-mad climate change.

programme.title: The 2000s: A New Reality: Chaos and Crisis
programme.desc: Topics include: the tragedy of the Kursk; the rise of reality shows like 'Survivor;' the 'summer of the shark;' the attack on the U.S.S. Cole by Al Qaeda; the tragedy of 9/11 and how America came to terms with it and learned to laugh again.

programme.title: The 2000s: A New Reality: Moment of Truth
programme.desc: Topics include: the tsunami of 2004; the triumphant capture of Saddam Hussein; Janet Jackson's 'wardrobe malfunction' at the Super Bowl halftime show; the creation of YouTube; 'Queer Eye for the Straight Guy;' Hurricane Katrina and the government failure.

programme.title: The '80s: The Decade That Made Us: Lift Off
programme.desc: See how the '80s created our modern world including the revolution in personal entertainment brought on by Pac-Man and Sony Walkmans while a new kid on the block defined a new musical era - spelled 'MTV.'

programme.title: The '80s: The Decade That Made Us: The Revolutionaries
programme.desc: Reagan's business mandate leads to a new breed of entrepreneurs, including Steve Jobs, whose '1984' ad helped launch the Super Bowl commercial craze and Ted Turner, who invented the 24-hour news network.

programme.title: The '80s: The Decade That Made Us: Shop 'Til You Drop

programme.desc: Follow the production of windshields, English saddles, butter and post clocks.

programme.title: How It's Made: Fireplace Bellows, Calissons, and Diving Watercraft
programme.desc: Featuring fireplace bellows; calissons; diving watercraft.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Curse of Satan's Catacombs
programme.desc: An abandoned system of caves was once the meeting place of a secret society that worshiped Satan and performed black magic. New discoveries at this mysterious site reveal what really happened here and why a Founding Father was a frequent guest.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Alien Hell Portal
programme.desc: A strange complex of tunnels on the grounds of a bizarre mansion was under lock-and-key for a century, and since its rediscovery, some believe its mysterious place is a gate to hell. New discoveries reveal its secret purpose and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Haunting of Heartbreak Castle
programme.desc: Experts investigate what was once a fairy-tale castle, but now is abandoned, and rumored to be haunted. They uncover secrets of the ancient fortress, and its ghostly stories.

programme.title: King Tut's Final Secrets
programme.desc: The most famous Egyptian king in history ruled for only 10 years before his mysterious death. Using 3-D CT-scan imaging, National Geographic reveals what King Tutankhamun looked like on the day he died and unveils new findings relating to his death.

programme.title: King Tut's Final Secrets
programme.desc: The most famous Egyptian king in history ruled for only 10 years before his mysterious death. Using 3-D CT-scan imaging, National Geographic reveals what King Tutankhamun looked like on the day he died and unveils new findings relating to his death.

programme.title: Unearthed: Lost Kingdom of Kush
programme.desc: Pyramids in the deserts of Sudan are the ruins of a powerful lost civilization that rivaled the pharaohs of ancient Egypt, and using cutting-edge tech and archaeological methods, experts are revealing the secrets behind the mysterious Kingdom of Kush.

programme.title: King Tut's Final Secrets
programme.desc: The most famous Egyptian king in history ruled for only 10 years before his mysterious death. Using 3-D CT-scan imaging, National Geographic reveals what King Tutankhamun looked like on the day he died and unveils new findings relating to his death.

programme.desc: The most famous Egyptian king in history ruled for only 10 years before his mysterious death. Using 3-D CT-scan imaging, National Geographic reveals what King Tutankhamun looked like on the day he died and unveils new findings relating to his death.

programme.desc: Pyramids in the deserts of Sudan are the ruins of a powerful lost civilization that rivaled the pharaohs of ancient Egypt, and using cutting-edge tech and archaeological methods, experts are revealing the secrets behind the mysterious Kingdom of Kush.

programme.title: King Tut's Final Secrets
programme.desc: The most famous Egyptian king in history ruled for only 10 years before his mysterious death. Using 3-D CT-scan imaging, National Geographic reveals what King Tutankhamun looked like on the day he died and unveils new findings relating to his death.

programme.title: King Tut's Final Secrets
programme.desc: The most famous Egyptian king in history ruled for only 10 years before his mysterious death. Using 3-D CT-scan imaging, National Geographic reveals what King Tutankhamun looked like on the day he died and unveils new findings relating to his death.

programme.title: Lost Kingdom of the Black Pharaohs
programme.desc: The Kush Empire was an ancient superpower that dominated the Nile Valley and rivaled the Egyptians, and now, a new, cutting-edge investigation at a mysterious tomb could reveal the secrets of this formidable lost kingdom.

programme.title: Unearthed: Lost Pyramid of the Americas
programme.desc: At an ancient city lost in the desert for 5,000 years, experts uncover evidence of human sacrifice and strange rituals, and new discoveries reveal that the people who lived here might have been the first civilization of the Americas.

programme.title: Unearthed: Nero's Lost Palace
programme.desc: New discoveries reveal the scandals and secrets of Nero and his lost palace. Using cutting-edge technology, experts may confirm if the infamous emperor burned down Rome so his could build his golden wonder.

programme.title: Unearthed: Egypt's Buried City
programme.desc: There's a lost city buried in the Sahara, and evidence reveals it's home to Nefertiti, Tutankhamun, and the forbidden god of an outlawed religion. Experts uncover the secret doomsday that caused this strange place to disappear.

programme.title: Unearthed: Curse of the Blood Pyramids
programme.desc: Giant pyramids at a strange site in Mexico are revealing the bloody secrets of a mysterious civilization that vanished 1,400 years ago. Little is known about this lost culture, but new discoveries are uncovering shocking evidence of human sacrifice.

programme.title: Unearthed: Secret History of the Sphinx
programme.desc: Recent forensic findings uncover the astonishing secrets of the world's most iconic monument, the great Sphinx at Giza. Join the extraordinary investigation as it reveals which pharaoh commissioned this colossal statue and why it was never finished.

programme.title: Unearthed: Inca Apocalypse: The Dark Evidence
programme.desc: New discoveries reveal secrets behind the fall of the Inca capital of Cusco.

programme.title: Unearthed: Curse of the Seventh Wonder
programme.desc: The Lighthouse of Alexandria is one of the world's original Seven Wonders, but it could have been home to a mysterious superweapon, and using cutting-edge tech, experts investigate the secrets of this fabled death ray and its long-lost home.

programme.title: Unearthed: Mystery of the Ice Mummy
programme.desc: The Iceman is the world's oldest and most perfectly preserved mummy, and brand-new cutting-edge forensic technology is revealing his darkest secrets; these discoveries could change everything we know about the humans who lived 5,000 years ago.

programme.title: Unearthed: Forbidden City of the Pharaohs
programme.desc: A mysterious city in ancient Egypt is the home of the Valley of the Kings and grand temples, and new discoveries reveal how they were built and if the god the pharaohs worshiped here helped them rise to power.

programme.title: Unearthed: Lost City of Troy
programme.desc: The legendary lost city at the center of the Trojan War is Troy, but its existence has never been confirmed. Now, discoveries and cutting-edge science might prove if this place existed, and if the Greeks really conquered it with the infamous Trojan Horse.

programme.title: Jacked: Auto Theft Task Force: Fastest Feet in the Fleet
programme.desc: The Unit has their busiest night; a break is taken to see who is the fastest in the unit.

programme.title: Jacked: Auto Theft Task Force: These Are the Streets
programme.desc: Stolen jeep followed; individuals are captured and a gun is recovered.

programme.title: Manhunters: Fugitive Task Force: Just One Step Behind
programme.desc: Detectives scour the streets to find people who are willing to provide information on a fugitive's whereabouts.

programme.title: Manhunters: Fugitive Task Force: Perfect Storm
programme.desc: Detectives track a fugitive wanted for the second-degree rape of a young woman barely out of high school.

programme.title: Manhunters: Fugitive Task Force: Roxanne's First Fugitive
programme.desc: Detective Roxanne Lopez has two conflicting tips about where a sexual offender may be.

programme.title: Manhunters: Fugitive Task Force: Hot and Cold
programme.desc: Officers nab a parole violator who raped a nine-year old and search for a fugitive wanted for violating parole on a manslaughter conviction.

programme.title: Manhunters: Fugitive Task Force: Ticking Time Bomb
programme.desc: Detectives are assigned a parolee who's on the most wanted list, and perform a building-to-building search for the man.

programme.title: Manhunters: Fugitive Task Force: Gun Store Heist
programme.desc: In Virginia Beach, Virginia, almost 30 handguns were stolen after thieves broke through the roof of a gun store. Detectives try to secure the firearms before the thieves have time to sell the guns on the streets.

programme.title: Jacked: Auto Theft Task Force: Nothing Good Happens After Midnight
programme.desc: The Task force realizes that finding cars are not their only job. They take down robbers, and then search for a man with a gun.

programme.title: Jacked: Auto Theft Task Force: I Just Wanted My Burger
programme.desc: The A.T.T.F. is on the prowl in Newark, New Jersey and they have plenty to keep them busy. First they get a work out when a perp takes off running, later they recover a stolen tractor trailer and a stolen car at a drive-thru window.

programme.title: Jacked: Auto Theft Task Force: It's Job Security
programme.desc: Task force patrols the streets at night incognito to track down unsuspecting thieves.

programme.title: Jacked: Auto Theft Task Force: Bail Out, Bail Out
programme.desc: An officer gets involved in a foot chase across the highway; the force uses a man's cigarettes to arrest him for theft.

programme.desc: Tommy and his team are back on the trail of a dangerous fugitive who was convicted for armed robbery and assault, and was deported over ten years ago.

programme.title: Manhunters: Fugitive Task Force: Chasing a Ghost
programme.desc: Investigators search for a murder suspect in the towns and mountainsides of Puerto Rico, which proves to be a nightmare.

programme.title: American Justice: Murder on the Boardwalk
programme.desc: Kosta Fotopoulos, a member of the Greek community in Daytona, invents a club for killers, and convinces his lover to kill a drifter so she can join.

programme.title: American Justice: Death of a Bride
programme.desc: In September 1999, a New Jersey woman is murdered by her ex-boyfriend on her wedding day.

programme.title: 60 Days In: The Beginning of the End
programme.desc: With two participants already inside the jail and three more entering, phase two will shatter expectations, open old wounds, and put everyone's safety in jeopardy.

programme.title: 60 Days In: Shank Anxiety
programme.desc: As the Phase Two participants settle into the Fulton County Jail and new ones enter, inmate feuds and power-plays bring participants face to face with real danger and real charges.

programme.title: 60 Days In: Pissed Off
programme.desc: In I-Pod, Jaclin begins to alienate the officers, inmates and her fellow participant, Stephanie, who decides to plot against her.

programme.title: 60 Days In: Party Favors
programme.desc: The participants have to be careful not to blow their covers as they try to stay focused amidst wild parties and difficult cellmates.

programme.title: Diabolical: Control Freak
programme.desc: Donna Scrivo adult son Ramsay in days, and she's worried. She alerts the local police, but days pass with no sign of him anywhere. Then a grisly discovery of a severed human head and body parts along a rural highway reveals a act of shocking violence.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: One of His Women
programme.desc: To the outside world, Aswad Ayinde was a hit music video director. But to his daughter, Aziza Ayinde Kibbibi, he was a repulsive monster who did horrifying things in God's name. After years of suffering, she finally escaped to reveal the truth about him.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Let Her Rot
programme.desc: When Joshua Hudnall went off to war, he felt more at home in combat than he ever did around his mother. Just when Joshua thought he had escaped her torment, she set her sights on someone else, and destroyed their family from within.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: I Hate Being Daddy's Girl
programme.desc: When Robin Doll was rescued from her mother's violence and went to live with her father, she thought she had cheated death. She had no way of knowing that the man she looked to as her savior was hiding something even worse.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Live to Tell: Standoff at Trader Joe's
programme.desc: For the first time, some of the hostages reveal the terrifying three hours they spent fearing for their lives while held inside a Los Angeles grocery store that was locked down by a gunman.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: My Brother Made History
programme.desc: As a boy, Travis Spencer always told himself that the cruel pranks his older brother, Timothy, played on him were ultimately harmless. He never suspected that his brother was using him to practice methods of torture that would be used on others.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: No Body Two Crimes
programme.desc: When a popular woman disappears from her home, police work tirelessly to uncover the route of her last known movements. Would a trail of videotape lead them to her killer?

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: My Twisted Sister
programme.desc: When Elizabeth Flores was a child, her sister, Louise, tried to shield her from a horrible family secret. But when Louise met David Turpin, that all changed. The girl who ran from monsters became one herself.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: My Brother Made History
programme.desc: As a boy, Travis Spencer always told himself that the cruel pranks his older brother, Timothy, played on him were ultimately harmless. He never suspected that his brother was using him to practice methods of torture that would be used on others.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: No Body Two Crimes
programme.desc: When a popular woman disappears from her home, police work tirelessly to uncover the route of her last known movements. Would a trail of videotape lead them to her killer?

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: My Twisted Sister
programme.desc: When Elizabeth Flores was a child, her sister, Louise, tried to shield her from a horrible family secret. But when Louise met David Turpin, that all changed. The girl who ran from monsters became one herself.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Live to Tell: Standoff at Trader Joe's
programme.desc: For the first time, some of the hostages reveal the terrifying three hours they spent fearing for their lives while held inside a Los Angeles grocery store that was locked down by a gunman.

programme.title: The Perfect Murder: Bizarre Love Triangle
programme.desc: Ann returns home from shopping to find her husband, Anthony, lifeless in bed, a gun beside him. Police soon find a second victim, Jacqueline Riggs, in the basement, stabbed to death. What happened here is a dark tale of love, lust and violence.

programme.title: The Perfect Murder: Daddy Dearest
programme.desc: A pretty young mother is shot dead in her bedroom in 1985, and her teenage stepdaughter confesses to the crime. The case is as good as closed, but detectives suspect there's more to this twisted family than meets the eye: and they're right.

programme.title: The Perfect Murder: Driving with the Devil
programme.desc: A car pulls into a Long Island gas station with a mother shot dead in the front seat. Her husband claims a stranger shot her on the highway, but he's foggy on the details.

programme.title: The Perfect Murder: The Body in the Swamp
programme.desc: Miami businessman Henry Diaz goes missing the night before a family vacation. His business success has earned him many enemies… even within his own family. But before police can figure out who killed Henry Diaz, they'll need to find his body.

programme.title: The Perfect Murder: Disappearing Act
programme.desc: California real estate developer Jana Koklich vanishes in the summer of 2000. Police suspect her job led her into danger, until a local pastor comes forward with a shocking confession. Someone is lying, but can detectives figure it out in time?

programme.title: Dateline: Manner of Death
programme.desc: It was a mystery from day one: a young father's life cut short. How Matt Podolak died was a curious. The word poison kept coming up. Unsure if it was suicide or murder, Matt's brother embarks on a long quest for the truth.

programme.title: Dateline: Manner of Death
programme.desc: It was a mystery from day one: a young father's life cut short. How Matt Podolak died was a curious. The word poison kept coming up. Unsure if it was suicide or murder, Matt's brother embarks on a long quest for the truth.

programme.title: Dateline: One Spring Night
programme.desc: It was an accusation that dominated the headlines: Sexual assault at an elite New England prep school. But even in places of power and privilege, one wrong choice can ruin it all. So what happened that night and who was telling the truth?

programme.title: The Lies that Bind: Warning Signs
programme.desc: A Deputy reports a 1990 Dodge Intrepid pushed over an embankment just south of Gig Harbor, Washington. He investigates and discovers the dead body of missing Puyallup father, Randall Ferguson, in the trunk. He had been shot twice in the head.

programme.title: The Lies that Bind: She Was Gone
programme.desc: Three months after high school sweethearts, Lisa and Jimmy Moore, end their marriage, Lisa disappears. Fearing the worst, her family file a missing person report, but the police have no leads, no witnesses, but they do know that someone is lying.

programme.title: The Lies that Bind: Smoke and Mirrors
programme.desc: On March 21st 2011, a fire burned down a parsonage behind a church and a Pastor loses his wife. Once the fire had settled a fire marshal investigated the site and discovered that there was more to the story than an accidental fire.

programme.title: The Lies that Bind: Letters in the Closet
programme.desc: Karla leaves her home one night and never returns. The next day, her husband calls the police to file a missing person report. When the police uncover a treasure trove of hidden secrets, they have to decide who is telling the truth and who is lying.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Desert War
programme.desc: The war that's encompassed the globe takes root in Africa. An ambitious Mussolini expands the war into North Africa; he sends ill-prepared soldiers, and forces Hitler to come to his ally's aid.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: D-Day and Liberation
programme.desc: Listen to the astonishing stories behind the liberation of France and hear the price many soldiers had to pay in order for the Allies to take France back from the Germans.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Eastern Front
programme.desc: The war reaches a critical turning point as Hitler expands the war to a second front. German soldiers endure the unrelenting climate of the Eastern Front, and face the full-force of angry Red Army fighters.

programme.title: Hitler's Death Ray
programme.desc: 5,100 miles from the Earth a solar death ray can be found orbiting the skies. At the thrust of rocket, this solar mirror will obliterate any city. This was the Nazi dream, see the reality.

programme.title: Hitler and the Aryan Myth
programme.desc: A laughable pseudo-history dreamt up by occult fantasists lay behind the myth of the Aryan super race. Yet it inspired the Nazis into war, legitimized the holocaust and led to the abduction of tens of thousands of young Aryan-looking children.

programme.title: Nazi Killer Magic
programme.desc: It is the great untold story of World War Two. The role the Occult played in shaping and determining the outcome of the fight. Nazi Killer Magic reveals how esotericism and mysticism influenced Hitler's wartime commanders.

programme.title: Hitler: The Actor
programme.desc: Investigates Hitler's breathtaking rise from election defeat in 1928 to Germany's Messiah in 1933. Experts analyze his speeches, dissect his PR gift and interrogate the mind of a man who ruthlessly executes his closest comrade.

programme.title: Hitler: The Opportunist
programme.desc: A look at the first three decades of Adolf Hitler's life unveils what transformed a down-and-out Austrian into the undisputed leader of the Nazi Party. We reveal the truth behind Hitler's time serving in World War One.

programme.title: Nazi Killer Magic
programme.desc: It is the great untold story of World War Two. The role the Occult played in shaping and determining the outcome of the fight. Nazi Killer Magic reveals how esotericism and mysticism influenced Hitler's wartime commanders.

programme.title: WWII in the Pacific: No Surrender
programme.desc: The war is turning America's way. Yet Japan is determined to kill as many Americans as possible and fight to the death. The US must determine if it has the stomach for the fight, or if there is a secret weapon that offers a quick way out.

programme.title: WWII in the Pacific: Waking the Beast
programme.desc: On December 7, 1941 Japan gambles all and attacks the US. In the first months of the war it looks as though Japan is unbeatable until the US fights back. The War in the Pacific engulfs Asia and launches an entirely new form of naval warfare.

programme.title: WWII in the Pacific: Island Warfare
programme.desc: By the summer of 1942, the US has the upper hand in the war with Japan. It has achieved naval superiority. In the spring of 1945 the loss of life is great for both sides but Japan refuses to surrender. US Chiefs desperately look for a way to end the way.

programme.title: Bullet Points: Battle for the Pacific
programme.desc: See how America recovered from Pearl Harbor and, in one year, achieved supremacy in the Pacific over the Japanese empire. Featuring highlights of the defining battles that turned the tide in the Pacific theater and led to victory.

programme.title: Bullet Points: America's First War on Communism
programme.desc: Five years after the end of World War Two, the Cold War turns hot when America faces two communist giants in Korea and succeeds in keeping tyranny in check.

programme.title: Bullet Points: Showdown in the Middle East
programme.desc: From 1948 to 1973 the Arabs and Israelis went to war five times for territory in the holy land of Palestine. See the key operations in one of the longest ongoing conflicts in world history.

programme.title: Weaponology: SAS
programme.desc: The SAS go behind enemy lines and have revolutionised the global war on terrorism.

programme.title: Weaponology: Tanks

programme.title: Weaponology: Artillery
programme.desc: Artillery is ever present on the battlefield, and always evolving to keep pace with warfare. From catapults to cannons, ballista to battleships, gunpowder to giant super guns, chart the evolution of this powerful dynasty of destruction.

programme.title: Weaponology: Vertical Take-Off
programme.desc: The Vertical Take-Off aircraft are the most innovative weapons at present day.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Alaskan Mobile Home
programme.desc: Mike falls further behind schedule due to wet weather and unforeseen obstacles. Dave and Hans get a surprise visit and much needed help to finish the cabin. Adam disassembles his cabin at the log yard and begins transporting it to his build site.

programme.title: Building Alaska: The Big Lift
programme.desc: Mike and his team get the rafters and roofing underway but with no lack of challenges. Dave and Hans are on their own with setting the extremely heavy ridge beam until help arrives. Adam successfully transports all of his logs to his build site.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Bush Alaska Approved
programme.desc: The tides become the ultimate decider for Dave, Hans, and Steve, and send Steve to the workshop. For builder Adam and his family, the weather can't dampen their excitement as they finish their cabin. Mike is racing the first snowfall.

programme.title: Building Alaska: My Life Is in Your Hands
programme.desc: Three new couples challenge the Alaskan elements. Mike and Kathleen Kondus build atop a windy tundra, first-time builders Mike and Teresa Oldenkamp construct a complex cabin and Paige Drobny and Cody Strathe create a dog-training facility on haunted land.

programme.title: Building Alaska: From Temporary to Permanent
programme.desc: Mike and Kathleen begin on the foundation, but their nail gun goes on the fritz and the posts aren't level. Dog mushers Paige and Cody run low on supplies. Mike and Teresa work on their foundation with a damaged excavator.

programme.title: Building Alaska: A Life of Near Misses
programme.desc: Paige and Cody realize they don't have the correct insulation for their log walls. Kathleen and Mike's team get dangerously high up to install the ridge beam. Mike and Teresa begin work on their floor, but discover the joists are not evenly spaced.

programme.title: Building Alaska: This Was A Rough One
programme.desc: The Owens work to finish the roof, but multiple falling objects and whiteout conditions make the job perilous.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Have Saw, Will Cut

programme.title: Restored: 1900 Victorian Farmhouse
programme.desc: A couple seeks Brett's help restoring their big 1900 Victorian Farmhouse in time for their wedding. They're hoping he can design a rustic kitchen, update the laundry area and add light to the interior rooms closed off by past modifications.

programme.title: Restored: 1901 Neoclassical Victorian
programme.desc: Brett helps an engaged couple restore their Victorian home, including a new kitchen and bathroom before their big wedding day. Brett begins work on the kitchen, removing additions and wallpaper.

programme.title: Restored: 1901 Shingle-Style Victorian
programme.desc: Instead of selling the family home, Brett convinces a son and his mother to restore their Victorian home. Brett knows once he restores their house back to its original glory they will never want to leave their family home of nearly 50 years.

programme.title: Restored: 1905 Queen Anne Victorian Restoration
programme.desc: One of Brett's old high school friends asks him to help restore her 1905 Queen Anne Victorian bungalow. She has many unfinished renovation projects but wants to finish them. She also wants to convert a bedroom into the office it was designed to be.

programme.title: Restored: The Yellow Victorian Farmhouse Facelift
programme.desc: Brett restores a Victorian farmhouse with an odd floor plan. Major foundation issues complicate the project, but the happy homeowners end up with a beautiful and functional house they could never have imagined.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: All Bricked Out
programme.desc: Tamara takes an 1892 brick Craftsman that was converted into three apartments and tries to restore it back into a single-family dwelling while keeping original details.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: The Swing of Things
programme.desc: Tamara continues working on an 1892 Craftsman and struggles to add a master bathroom. Then, she finds a way to repurpose floor boards into a porch swing, but her plan to reuse a clawfoot tub hits a snag because of a narrow doorway.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Double Dutch Dilemma
programme.desc: Tamara gets the opportunity to renovate a French chateau she's wanted to tackle for years. She finds that a recent renovation left the kitchen looking outdated and tacky, but she's determined to create a home full of authentic details.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: The Trouble With Cobbles
programme.desc: Tamara continues work on a French chateau as she overhauls a large master suite covered in the tackiest wallpaper she's ever ripped out. She plans to move a bathroom to create an additional bedroom and extend a hallway.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: The Mural of the Story
programme.desc: Tamara works on restoring a 1909 Craftsman home, ripping out the tacky additions that have stripped it of its original charm. She saves a wallpaper mural that could be the showpiece of the dining room, if she can keep it from being destroyed.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Clowning Around
programme.desc: Tamara continues with the 1909 Craftsman, transforming a small bedroom into the master bath. She saves and refurbishes French doors, vintage sinks, and a tub from the house, while adding modern elements like a sauna.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: From Studs to Spindles
programme.desc: Tamara Day steps in to finish the renovation of a 1890s Craftsman-style home. This home was previously ripped down to the studs by a contractor before it was abandoned.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Book Lamps and Bubble Glass
programme.desc: Renovations on the 1890s Craftsman-style home continues as Tamara enlarges the master bedroom and creates a beautiful study. She runs into trouble when the antique tiles for the bathroom floor are not salvageable. Tamara finds a way to re-use old glass.

programme.title: Cupcake Wars: WildAid Save The Tigers
programme.desc: It's going to get wild in the kitchen as four bakers fight for the chance to serve their cupcakes at a huge celebrity gala honoring Jackie Chan and his work with animal conservation group, WildAid. Actress Minnie Driver judges.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: 89er Days/ Puno Strawberry Festival
programme.desc: Host Noah Cappe heads to Oklahoma to pig out on a giant Texas tenderloin sandwich. Then, he heads to Virginia for a strawberry pizza.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Viva! Vienna! Festival/ Contra Band Days Festival
programme.desc: Noah Cappe heads to Virginia for creamy crab dip and discovers the secret to authentic crawfish gumbo in Louisiana.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Oak Mountain Spring State Fair/ Apache Rattlesnake Festival
programme.desc: Noah Cappe is crazy about fried bread pudding bites in Alabama. He then gets bitten by a fried rattlesnake in Oklahoma.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Portland Rose Festival and Got to Be NC Fair
programme.desc: Host Noah Cappe is in Portland to try beef tongue tacos. He then heads to North Carolina for a donut sloppy Joe.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Ham-let
programme.desc: Noah heads to San Diego and hams it up at the Balboa Park December Nights festival. The day starts off right with a breakfast Belgian waffle called the "Ham I Am."

programme.title: Carnival Eats: A-Frying In Winter
programme.desc: Noah Cappe chills out with some cool Twin City treats at the Saint Paul Winter Carnival. Despite sub-zero temperatures, he gets into the spirit with local specialties like the Nordic Waffle Pizza and the super-indulgent Biergarten Cupcake.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Mumbai
programme.desc: Andrew unveils Mumbai's multicultural flavors and addictive ingredients. A city built on chaos and hard work, Mumbai showcases its history through its delicious eateries. The city's edible icons include deep-fried fish and prawns and saucy goat.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Chengdu
programme.desc: From the blistering 'Hot Pot' and fiery Mapo Tofu to spicy Kung Pao Chicken, Andrew Zimmern explores the famous scorching dishes that make Chengdu, China, a delicious destination.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Albuquerque

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Donald's Clubhouse

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Minnie and Daisy's Flower Shower

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Pluto Lends a Paw

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Mickey's Big Surprise/ Meet the Beagles
