programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Mickey's Fun-tastical Field Day/ Clarabelle on the Mooo-ve!
programme.desc: During Fun-tastical Field Day, Donald tries to do all the competitions himself. The girls reunite for a race so that Clarabelle can try to become a Roadsterette!

programme.title: Bluey: Mum and Dads / Mount Mumandad / Asparagus
programme.desc: Rusty and Indy have a disagreement; Bluey and Bingo pretend Mum and Dad are a mountain; Dad teaches Bluey table manners.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Hissy's Big Day/ Go, Dog. Go!
programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly try to cheer Hissy up by taking her to their favourite places. Later, A.R.F. is reprogrammed to take the pugs where they want, but not being them back.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: To the Library!/ARF's Birthday
programme.desc: When Bob discovers he lost a library book, the Pugs race out on a mission to get it before it’s due. The Pugs go on a last minute mission for party supplies for ARF’s birthday.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Adopt-a-Palooza/ The Legend of Captain Wunderbark
programme.desc: When a puppy gets lost at Adopt-A-Palooza, it's up to the pugs, Keia and their new friend to find it. Bingo, Rolly and Keia go off in search of Captain Wunderbark's long-lost ship.

programme.title: Gigantosaurus: Saving Ayati/ The Crevice
programme.desc: When Ayati loses her balance and falls over, Mazu must come up with a big idea to help! A large crevice rips through the ground and traps the four little dinos in Giganto’s path!

programme.title: Gigantosaurus: The Island/ Don't Cave In
programme.desc: Timid Bill and brave Rocky end up stranded on an island, however Rocky suddenly becomes the scared one! Trey warns the little dinos about a cave monster named “Shriekasaurus”.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Goof Quest/ Llama Drama
programme.desc: Goofy and Donald team up with Uncle Goof to treasure hunt in Peru. The Happy Helpers discover the only way to deliver a package is to travel by llama up a mountain!

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: The Impossible Race/ The Happiest Helpers Cruise!
programme.desc: Cuckoo Loca enters her first Roadster event. Then, the happy helpers become cruise directors on Valentine's Day.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: The Great Pug-scape/ Luck of the Pug-ish
programme.desc: After Hissy gets a 'time out' for the day, Bingo and Rolly try to break her out of her punishment. To change Bob's fortune, the pugs travel to Ireland to bring home some good luck.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Valentine Surprise/ Bright Lights, Pup City
programme.desc: The pups look for Valentine's Day gifts for Bob and Chloe; Bob is sad when the Symphony of Lights is canceled, so the pups try to fix the lights.

programme.title: PJ Masks: Gekko Everywhere / Gekko Takes Charge
programme.desc: Gekko finds a crystal that gives him powers, but it turns out the powers are too strong! While Gekko tries to stop the Ninjalinos on his own, Night Ninja tries to take over HQ!

programme.title: PJ Masks: Wolfy Mountain/ Romeo's Crystal Clear Plan
programme.desc: The Wolfy Kids overtake Mystery Mountain from Night Ninja. Romeo steals the Moon Crystal, but the PJ Masks are convinced Luna Girl is the culprit.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: When L.O.S.E.R.S. Attack
programme.desc: Timmy's enemies join forces and form the League Of Super Evil Revenge Seekers.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Cat and Mouse/ Chip off the Old Crock
programme.desc: Timmy and Chloe have to help a depressed Catman prove to his girlfriend that he's a real superhero. Mr. Crocker teaches his nephew to be a FAIRY catcher.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Food Fight/ Please Don't Feed the Turners
programme.desc: Timmy wishes Mom were the best chef in the world.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Beach Blanket Bozos/ Poltergeeks
programme.desc: Dad admits he dropped out of school in grade 5 and joins Timmy's class.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Pack Animal/ The Haunted Getaway
programme.desc: Dave tells Simon to throw out some stuff, and a few of his experiments end up in the wrong hands; Dave and the guys rent a cabin in the woods that might be haunted.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Pizza Dash/ Glory Days
programme.desc: The town is under attack when Simon creates a drone that can not only deliver pizzas but has the ability to learn.Alvin worries the munks are responsible for making Dave boring when they find out he used to be a rock star.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Simsky/ Lucky Day
programme.desc: Simon is alarmed to discover he's been tagging private property in his sleep. Alvin's luck goes from bad to worse after Theodore finds a four-leaf clover and everything starts going his way.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Fairly Oddlympics
programme.desc: Timmy and friends compete in an Olympics of their own to see who is most magical.

programme.desc: Cosmo and Wanda are exhausted, so Timmy volunteers to baby-sit and give them a night out. Timmy's tired of getting really bad haircuts from Dad.

programme.title: Conan

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine: Old School

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine: Thanksgiving

programme.title: Conan
programme.desc: Featuring comedy, celebrity interviews and musical performances.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: To Hatch a Predator

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Out of Left Field
programme.desc: The guys try not to crack up during a four-way face off and later find that a stroll with the Gatto pups is no walk in the park. Plus, tonight's big loser suffers more than muscle failure in a major league embarrassment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Indecent Proposal
programme.desc: Sal, Murr, Joe and Q don absurd disguises to trick unsuspecting receptionists, then try to convince strangers to sign off on some unusual emails. Plus, the big loser turns a harmless dance class into a dance with danger.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Turning the Tables
programme.desc: Sal, Joe, Murr and Q take a spin in a motorized chair hoping the kindness of strangers will keep them on track. Tonight's big loser walks away bruised and battered when he's forced to clear some tables in an unusual way.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Chick Magnet
programme.desc: The guys turn on the charm to make a restaurant basement sound enticing and recruit unsuspecting shoppers to shout out bizarre nicknames. Then, tonight's big loser must find his way out of the cuckoo's nest before the chicks get crazy.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Sal, Murr, Joe and Q pull desk duty, and then do strangers a solid by barring them from the bathroom. Plus, the big loser learns the hard way that gratuity is not included.

programme.title: 2 Broke Girls: And the Cupcake Captives
programme.desc: Sophie's wedding shower is interrupted by a hostage situation. Elsewhere, Max and Caroline's cupcake business gets unwanted attention when a tenant is arrested while wearing their company's T-shirt.

programme.title: 2 Broke Girls: And the Fat Cat
programme.desc: A handsome businessman returns Max and Caroline's missing cat, Nancy, who comes home with a big surprise.

programme.title: 2 Broke Girls: And the Zero Tolerance
programme.desc: Max and Caroline attempt to bring in extra money to help pay off their bank loan by taking second jobs as a pastry chef and a hostess at a chic restaurant.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond: Bully on the Bus
programme.desc: Ray and Debra's points of view differ when they learn that Ally has been bullying a child.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Flashover

programme.title: PAW Patrol: Pups Save the Parrot/ Pups Save the Queen Bee
programme.desc: The PAW Patrol heads to the jungle to help their friend Carlos find his lost parrot, Mateo. Also, when the PAW Patrol discovers a beehive in Cap'n Turbot's lighthouse, Ryder and the pups must work together to find the bees a new home.

programme.title: PAW Patrol: Pups Save a Humsquatch / Pups Save a Far Flung Flying Disc
programme.desc: Travelling Travis yelps for help when he finds a mysterious creature in trouble. A robo-toy causes mayhem in Adventure Bay.

programme.title: Blue's Clues & You: Growing With Blue
programme.desc: Come along as Josh, Blue, and our friends learn that everything grows in different ways like fruits, vegetables, even you and Blue too! We play Blue's Clues to figure out what game Blue wants to play outside today.

programme.title: PAW Patrol: Pups Save a Giant Chicken/ Pups Stop Harold's Deep Freeze
programme.desc: The Ladybird is back and Chickaletta has super powers. The Mighty Twins join the Mighty Pups to save a giant chicken and the town.The Mighty Pups have to stop Harold Humdinger before he puts Adventure Bay in a deep freeze so he can become mayor.

programme.title: The Adventures of Paddington: Paddington and the Monster Hunt/ Paddington and the Treehouse
programme.desc: The children want to camp out for the night in the treehouse, but a storm arrives. There's a monster in Paddington's room.

programme.title: PAW Patrol: Pups Save Big Paw/ Pups Save a Hum-Mover
programme.desc: When an ancient relic goes missing from Carlos' archeological dig, Tracker and Skye must track down the creature that may have taken it.

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines: Power Tires
programme.desc: When his tires get popped, Blaze thinks he's out of the race for good. Luckily, Gabby is there with a new set of Power Tires high-tech wheels that can transform into anything Blaze needs to keep rolling.

programme.title: Ryan's Mystery Playdate: Ryan's Camera Ready Playdate/ Ryan's Rattlin' Playdate
programme.desc: Ryan gets the scoop on his challenges before going live on the red carpet with his mystery playdate. The next item up for bid is a set of challenges that Ryan must rattle through before the mystery playdate helps him sell a thing or two.

programme.title: PAW Patrol: Pups Save Their Floating Friends/ Pups Save a Satellite
programme.desc: A satellite is out of orbit and falling towards Adventure Bay so the PAW Patrol must fix it before it crash lands.

programme.title: PAW Patrol: Mission PAW: Royally Spooked!/ Pups Save Monkey-Dinger

programme.title: The First 48: Fifty Dollar Murder/ Murder in Liberty City
programme.desc: Sergeants in Memphis hope video surveillance will help identify the suspect who shot a convenience store clerk during a robbery. Officers find a crime scene with a dead victim, and another with a wounded man just blocks apart, and try to find a witness.

programme.title: The First 48: Road Hazard/ Cold
programme.desc: A detective works to find out who shot a motorcycle club president in the head after running him of the road. Another detective tries to catch the killer of a mother of seven who was strangled to death.

programme.title: The First 48: Silent Rage/ Tainted Love
programme.desc: A deputy is called out on Easter Sunday to investigate the brutal shooting of a woman who drove a school bus and was a mother of two children.

programme.title: The First 48: No Escape/ Trail of Evidence
programme.desc: Detectives investigate the murder of Darrell Harrell, gunned down for trying to push a group of drug dealers out of town.

programme.title: Kids Behind Bars: Life or Parole: Bobby
programme.desc: Bobby shot girlfriend Krissi's mother and father as they slept in their home in Frisco, Texas. The mother died, but the father survived. Bobby was sentenced to life despite claims he was manipulated into committing the murder.

programme.title: Kids Behind Bars: Life or Parole: James
programme.desc: On November 24, 1990, 15-year-old James killed his stepmother and three young brothers with a shotgun, and then set their rural Wyoming home on fire.

programme.title: Kids Behind Bars: Life or Parole: Preston
programme.desc: On March 4, 2010, 17-year-old Preston was one of three teens involved in a murder during an attempted robbery in Fort Walton Beach, Florida. Along with the other teens, Preston was sentenced to life without parole.

programme.title: Kids Behind Bars: Life or Parole: Otis
programme.desc: On March 31, 1998 in Albany, Georgia, 16-year-old Otis broke into Valerie's home and allegedly tried to rob her. During the attempt, Valerie and her 16-year-old daughter, Valene, were shot. Valerie dies weeks later and her daughter was disfigured.

programme.title: The First 48: Deadly Obsession/ The Killer You Know
programme.desc: Law enforcement officers embark on a manhunt after the murder of a young couple. The search for the cold-blooded killer takes them across three states. In Cleveland, a man is shot in his own backyard.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Prehistoric Fossil Breeding
programme.desc: Michael schools a man on fish fossil breeding at a rock store and colours with his tongue at a paint store. Then, on a construction site, Michael and his helper dig up a skeleton that still has some life in it.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Sorcery or Science
programme.desc: Michael sweetens a woman's day at a candy store when a chocolate bunny eats her ring, and at the stadium for the Chicago White Sox, he inflates pretzels at a snack stand. Plus, one of Michael's tricks gets flushed down the tubes.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Butt of the Joker
programme.desc: The guys pair up in focus group presentations, and tonight's loser tries to cure the public of a nasty habit, but gets people smoking mad.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Deal With the Devils
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr invade a silent library to see who can make the most noise without getting into trouble. Plus, they search for their missing wives at the mall, and tonight's two losers get iced out by the New Jersey Devils.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Takes the Cake
programme.desc: Find out if any of the Jokers are avid skiers, and how the maître d' helped when seating patrons. Also, learn why Joe had a hard time escaping the giant cake.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Drum and Drummer
programme.desc: So many shoppers in the candy aisle during 'Star Struck'. The celeb that was on set while the guys filmed 'Brain Games'.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Tied and Feathered
programme.desc: The parts of Out of Remote Control that annoyed people more than any challenge to date. Why the crew was emotionally scarred after Debate and Switch.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Field of Screams
programme.desc: How the creepy voice changer was made for Devil Voices. The penguin tips Murr learned as a zookeeper.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Stuffed Turkey
programme.desc: The amount of times Joe showed his butt on the show. Why the volunteers were turned away for Tool Bag.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Blind Justice
programme.desc: Find out why the Jokers killed the idea of Joe going shirtless in the boxing ring, and which of the Jokers loves dancing but is no good at it.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Crickets
programme.desc: The perfect place to film an IJ challenge. The customers after consuming Q's hot dog smoothie.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Stage Fright
programme.desc: The guys serve up raw deals at a pawn shop counter and try to convince strangers to give them hugs. Plus, tonight's loser performs his life story through song.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: No Child Left Behind
programme.desc: Find out how you make a 'Grandpa Whoopsie' doll, why winter is the perfect season to play pin for the win and where the idea for Q's dirty diaper challenge came from.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Pulling the Rug
programme.desc: Find out where Joe originally wanted to play hide n' seek, what Q's favourite dessert is, and what the crew was most afraid of during Murr's wig-pulling punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Chairman
programme.desc: The guys shock their fellow shoppers by going footloose and fancy free in a discount store, then pose insane questions to strangers in the park. Tonight's loser is taken for the ride of his life in a tricked out wheelchair he can't possibly control.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Scarytales
programme.desc: The guys are forced to look for love in all the wrong places at a singles' event, and then phone it in making embarrassing calls on strangers' cells.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Laundry Day
programme.desc: The guys look for partners in crime at a supermarket and throw caution to the wind as helpless romantics. Plus, tonight’s loser has a serious wardrobe malfunction.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Mime and Punishment
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr and Q put the nasty in namaste when they lead guided meditations. Tonight's big loser gets boxed in with a 24-hour punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Indecent Proposal
programme.desc: Find out why Murr had to shave in under three minutes between scenes of That Ain't Me, what the Jokers love most about Writers Blocked, and where Sal ranks his indecent dance instructor punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Turning the Tables
programme.desc: Find out how the Jokers keep their cover while filming at the mall, and Q's favorite VR word. Plus, learn how long Joe was sore after the table-busting punishment.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Wait, My Chair!
programme.desc: Michael shows a caterer the true power of dairy products, and an antique store customer is stunned when a species of termite chews through the scenery.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Soliciting Statue
programme.desc: At an antique store, Michael shows off an impossible way to organize your clothes, and back at the supermarket we find out that there are some serious surprises lurking in our favorite foods.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Speed Thieves
programme.desc: Michael adds spice to lunch at a diner, and at a furniture store, he shows his co-worker that impossible things can happen in the blink of an eye.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Impractically Carbonaro Jokers Effect
programme.desc: Four very impractical assistants invade a coffee bar to help Michael stun customers, but they quickly discover the joke is on them.

programme.title: Miz & Mrs.: It's a Miz-Tery
programme.desc: Mike plays detective when he suspects Maryse is hiding a secret. Maryse helps Mike learn French.

programme.title: The Daily Pop
programme.desc: Your go-to for behind-the-scenes scoop, celebrity guests and entertainment conversation.

programme.title: Meet the Frasers: When Heaven Calls, Matt Fraser Answers

programme.title: Movie: Dirty Dancing
programme.desc: While on vacation, a girl discovers love and romance with a local dance instructor.

programme.title: Movie: Maid in Manhattan
programme.desc: A senatorial candidate falls for a hotel maid who is posing as a wealthy Manhattan socialite.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Supermarket Masters Tournament: Part 2
programme.desc: The Supermarket Masters Tournament continues as four more GGG winners compete for a guaranteed $10,000 and a shot at winning up to $25,000 more in the finale. First, the chefs have to serve up a plate of hometown comfort.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Supermarket Masters Tournament: Part 3
programme.desc: Four more GGG winners are ready to master the store in part three of the Supermarket Masters Tournament. First, they must make a steakhouse dinner, even though the meat and seafood sections of the market are unexpectedly closed.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Supermarket Masters Tournament: Part 4
programme.desc: Four past GGG winners are vying for an instant $10,000 and the last spot in the Supermarket Masters Tournament finale. First, they must make a high-end, old-school dinner that includes the mish-mash of ingredients on Guy's Grocery List.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Supermarket Masters Tournament: Finale
programme.desc: The final four Supermarket Masters are ready to compete for the title of champion and the biggest shopping spree ever, worth up to $25,000.

programme.title: Kids Baking Championship: Extra Icing: Sammy Whammy

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Cheap And Easy
programme.desc: Ree Drummond has been stocking up for four make-ahead meals that are as cheap as they are easy to make. There's inexpensive slow cooker teriyaki ribs with quick slaw, Tex-Mex meatballs, BBQ chicken baked potatoes and a cheesy rigatoni pepper bake.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Homage to Julia Child
programme.desc: Trisha and her sister, Beth, are paying homage to Julia Child for the day; dressing up like her and making Trisha's versions of some of Julia's classic French dishes, accidents and all. They make beef bourguignon, potato pancakes and apple charlotte.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Southern Fusion
programme.desc: Trisha Yearwood invites her friend Sarah Gavigan, owner of Japanese pub-style restaurant Bar Otaku, to her home for a Japanese-infused Southern meal.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Feeding The Home Team
programme.desc: Trisha presents recipes that are perfect for a large gathering.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Halftime Funtime
programme.desc: Trisha invites family and friends over for a halftime-themed party, featuring crowd-pleasers like pimento cheese queso, spicy artichoke dip, Nashville hot chicken meatball sliders, plus lime and orange wedge gelatin shots!

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Game Day 101
programme.desc: Trisha Yearwood makes variety game day dips: black-eyed pea, caramelized onion and pistachio cheese.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Chinese Family Favorites
programme.desc: Molly Yeh is making some of her favourite Chinese-inspired recipes, including some passed down from her dad's family. He's flying in with Molly's Aunt Lucy to visit her and baby Bernie, so Molly makes them her grandma's sweet and sour tepong pork.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Lunch for the Crew
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is preparing a well-deserved lunch at the lodge for the cowboy crew. She makes a crispy-coated ranch favorite, chicken fried steak sliders piled on beautiful, warm buttermilk biscuits and served with buttermilk gravy.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: 16-Minute Meals: All Day Long
programme.desc: It's 16-minute meals all day today, with croissant French toast with maple whipped cream and blackberry syrup for breakfast, grilled chicken and strawberry salad wraps for lunch, and Pawhuska cheese steaks and apple peanut butter delight for dinner.

programme.title: Chopped Junior: Sloppy Apps

programme.title: Chopped: Secrets Of Winning

programme.title: Dr. Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet: A Far Away Home

programme.title: Too Cute!: Little Lion Pups

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo: Heating Up a Sun Bear Romance

programme.title: Haunted Case Files: Ghost Cops
programme.desc: Paranormal investigators encounter the spirits of former cops inside a deserted police precinct, a team experiences unprecedented physical contact with friendly ghosts and an evil entity is hell-bent on causing harm to a psychic medium.

programme.title: Haunted Case Files: Taken Over
programme.desc: In Illinois, the Tolfs investigate the site of one of the earliest recorded possessions in the United States. Karlo is called to a lakeside property in Ohio to remove a troublesome spirit. Eric runs into a unique problem at a haunted former hospital.

programme.title: Haunted Case Files: Haunted Hospital

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Love, Love Me Stew

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Au Revoir, Sirocco

programme.title: NCIS: Troll
programme.desc: Special Agent Ned Dorneget from NCIS cyber operations assists the team when a Navy ensign who worked in the Office of Naval Intelligence is murdered. Meanwhile, the team discovers that Jake and Gibbs have become good friends.

programme.title: NCIS: The Lost Boys
programme.desc: The NCIS cyber case turns into a united global effort after evidence confirms The Calling, an international terrorist group that recruits children through the Internet, has been purchasing S-bombs off the black market.

programme.title: NCIS: Neverland
programme.desc: NCIS feverishly investigates a global terrorist group that is recruiting teens via the internet following a deadly bombing overseas that results in an emotional and surprising loss for the team.

programme.title: NCIS: The Artful Dodger
programme.desc: Evidence in an NCIS murder case reveals a rare painting on loan had been swapped for a fake, prompting DiNozzo, Sr., to share his knowledge and contacts on the black market art world with the team.

programme.title: NCIS: Status Update
programme.desc: After the body of a thief is found in a marine's house, the team discovers the calling card of a terror group Delilah and the Department of Defense have been tracking.

programme.title: NCIS: Patience
programme.desc: The murder of a petty officer sparks a lead in a 40-year-old airport bombing cold case that Gibbs and DiNozzo have been assigned to for the past two years. Also, McGee is jealous that he was not previously briefed on the cold case.

programme.title: NCIS: No Good Deed
programme.desc: DiNozzo is partnered with his girlfriend, ATF Special Agent Zoé Keates, after evidence reveals that the murder weapon in an NCIS case was originally purchased for the controversial ATF sting operation.

programme.title: NCIS: Lost in Translation
programme.desc: Gibbs and Bishop travel to Afghanistan after the murder of a marine in D.C. is linked to a terror group holding another marine hostage overseas. DiNozzo is upset that McGee was chosen to be the new face of NCIS for all recruitment brochures.

programme.title: NCIS: Troll
programme.desc: Special Agent Ned Dorneget from NCIS cyber operations assists the team when a Navy ensign who worked in the Office of Naval Intelligence is murdered. Meanwhile, the team discovers that Jake and Gibbs have become good friends.

programme.title: NCIS: The Lost Boys
programme.desc: The NCIS cyber case turns into a united global effort after evidence confirms The Calling, an international terrorist group that recruits children through the Internet, has been purchasing S-bombs off the black market.

programme.title: NCIS: Neverland
programme.desc: NCIS feverishly investigates a global terrorist group that is recruiting teens via the internet following a deadly bombing overseas that results in an emotional and surprising loss for the team.

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent: Flipped
programme.desc: A young rap artist is killed while leaving a radio station. Detectives question the only witness at the scene, who reveals he is an undercover cop whose task force specializes in crimes within the rap world.

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent: Brother's Keeper
programme.desc: In a 'ripped from the headlines' story, a televangelist's wife is found murdered, and his secret sessions with a hustler may have led to her murder. While visiting his ailing mother in the hospital, Det. Goren runs into his long lost brother.

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent: Thirty
programme.desc: When a journalist realizes he has been poisoned, he rushes to his old friend, Det. Logan. Lemle is convinced it traces back to a story he's working on, but all leads turn up clean.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: A Night Owl
programme.desc: While working at a sobriety checkpoint, Burgess finds a duffle bag full of heroin in the truck of a respected college professor who claims to know nothing about how the drugs ended up there.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: The Cases That Need to Be Solved
programme.desc: When a young boy is executed, Intelligence turns to the boy's parents for information. Upon further investigation, they discover the boy's father has a criminal background and was part of a local gang.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Forty-Caliber Bread Crumb
programme.desc: While out on a bank run for his off-duty security job, Halstead and his co-workers find themselves under attack by a violent robbery crew which quickly becomes a full-scale shoot-out.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Kasual With a K
programme.desc: While responding to a call of shots fired, Voight, Antonio and Halstead come across a secret battered women's shelter and discover the owner has been wounded.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: If We Were Normal
programme.desc: When a call comes in about a woman stabbing a man then fleeing the scene, Burgess and Lindsay go investigate and find a young woman with the weapon in her hand.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: In a Duffle Bag
programme.desc: Voight responds to a call about a suspicious duffle bag, and uncovers a frigid newborn baby. Determined to find the culprit who abandoned the infant, Intelligence receives a promising lead based on information provided by Chicago Med.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Justice
programme.desc: After a hooded man opens fire on their patrol car, Roman is left wounded and Burgess takes off after the shooter. No gun is found at the crime scene and the victim is a 17-year-old honour student who will likely never walk again.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: She's Got Us
programme.desc: When Lindsay and Halstead arrive at the scene of a shooting, they discover the only survivor is a young girl. Meanwhile, Antonio and Olinsky look into a pyramid scheme.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Start Digging
programme.desc: When the team finds the body of a widowed, single-mother, they are shocked to discover that the victim was in constant contact with Voight's now-reformed son, Justin.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: The Silos
programme.desc: Intelligence investigates a gruesome case. Upon further examination, it appears the victim was wearing a CPD issued wire at the time of his death. Meanwhile, Burgess meets her new partner, who came from a terrible assignment.

programme.title: Movie: The Simpsons Movie
programme.desc: Homer's actions cause a leak of radioactive material from the Nuclear Plant into the river. Homer has to try and fix the problem before Springfield can no longer be saved.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Homer the Smithers
programme.desc: When Smithers takes a much-needed vacation, Homer is hired as a temporary replacement. After Homer loses his temper, Mr. Burns tackles some of the basic tasks himself and his newfound independence leaves Smithers jobless.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Day the Violence Died
programme.desc: Bart helps a homeless man prove he was the rightful creator of Itchy and Scratchy. But when the man is awarded damages in court, the Itchy and Scratchy studios have to close for good.

programme.title: The Simpsons: A Fish Called Selma

programme.title: The Simpsons: 22 Short Films About Springfield

programme.title: How the Universe Works

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Strange Lives of Dwarf Planets
programme.desc: Our solar system is home to hundreds of strange, tiny worlds called dwarf planets, and new discoveries reveal the secrets of these mysterious places.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Hunt for Alien Life
programme.desc: The latest discoveries suggest that we might be on the verge of discovering life beyond our planet, and scientists are investigating if earth's life began elsewhere in the universe, and whether we need to evolve to know for sure.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Strangest Alien Worlds
programme.desc: Discoveries of new planets have revealed countless worlds much stranger than Earth. Some of these strange worlds don't have stars, others are made out of diamonds.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Strange Lives of Dwarf Planets
programme.desc: Our solar system is home to hundreds of strange, tiny worlds called dwarf planets, and new discoveries reveal the secrets of these mysterious places.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Hunt for Alien Evidence
programme.desc: The discovery of extraterrestrial life might face an impossible challenge: the physics of the universe itself. Using cutting-edge technology, experts might be on the verge of a groundbreaking find and the evidence could already be in hand.

programme.title: Space's Deepest Secrets: The Time Travel Enigma
programme.desc: Recent discoveries in the cosmos are proving that time travel is less impossible than we think, while the newest discoveries in space and theoretical physics have us on the brink of cracking one of the universe's greatest puzzles.

programme.title: Space's Deepest Secrets: Rise of the Red Planet
programme.desc: The latest science reveals what it would take to build colonies on Mars, and how our future on the Red Planet might be closer than we think.

programme.title: Space's Deepest Secrets: Secrets of the Seven Earths
programme.desc: The new discovery of seven alien Earth-like planets in a faraway solar system is a major milestone in our hunt for extraterrestrial life, and experts investigate the secrets of TRAPPIST-1's mysterious worlds to reveal if we're truly alone in the universe.

programme.title: Space's Deepest Secrets: New Race to the Moon
programme.desc: New discoveries show that the Moon could be our next home for human life.

programme.title: Space's Deepest Secrets: Mystery of the Alien Asteroid
programme.desc: When a strange alien object is discovered speeding through the solar system, experts race to uncover if it's real evidence of extraterrestrial contact, or a deadly asteroid on a collision course with planet earth.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost: Stonehenge: The Forbidden History
programme.desc: Experts use the latest technology to reveal how a primitive civilization built one of the world's greatest structures, Stonehenge.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost: Forbidden City of the Deep
programme.desc: Experts investigate the world's oldest sunken city and reveal the secrets lost to the ocean almost four thousand years ago.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost: Curse of the Catacombs
programme.desc: An underground labyrinth containing thousands of human skeletons is a dark mystery beneath the streets of Rome, and now, experts are using cutting-edge tech to reveal what killed them and why they were buried in this eerie place.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost: Atlantis: The New Mystery
programme.desc: New evidence reveals that Atlantis is not just a myth, but a real civilization devastated by an apocalyptic volcanic eruption, and now, experts use the latest science to unearth discoveries that might confirm the location of this mysterious lost city.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost: Great Pyramid: The Lost Treasure
programme.desc: The recent discovery of an ancient Egyptian treasure offers new clues that could finally reveal how the Great Pyramid was built.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost: Ghosts of the Great Pyramid
programme.desc: Experts use a long-lost relic to bring the workers who built the Great Pyramid back to life, reshaping everything we know about ancient Egypt and its treasures.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost: Hunt for the Ark of the Covenant
60 Days In: Jail Crush
programme.desc: While Stephanie chooses to use drugs to bond with her fellow inmates, Jaclin finds acceptance by creating her own jail clothing line, bringing pink flare and positivity to the inmates of I-Pod, but causing heated confrontations with the officers.

programme.title: 60 Days In: Blood Rules
programme.desc: The participants are faced with challenges when a gas scare happens in the women's pod, a football kitty goes missing in 500 prompting a gang fight, and a new inmate in 600 tests Matt.

programme.title: 60 Days In: Sexual Preference
programme.desc: When Jaclin tries to help Stephanie switch rooms, it puts a target on Jaclin's back, Emmanuel also becomes a target when he tries to break up a fight, and a rumor about Andrew being gay could put him in harm's way.

programme.title: 60 Days In: See Nothing, Say Nothing
programme.desc: Two participants struggle with the decision to leave the program early, while the rest try to keep their wits as they finish the back half of their time in the Fulton County Jail.

programme.title: 60 Days In: Nachos, Strippers, and Whippit
programme.desc: Matt wrestles with the most devastating moment of his life, Alan gets a mysterious new cellmate, and the inmates throw an unforgettable birthday party.

programme.title: 60 Days In: The Inmate Who Loved Me
programme.desc: After an emotional breakdown, Alan is not sure he can continue in the program, Nate expands his meth investigation, Johnny defends a female officer, and Angele falls deeper in love with Gabrielle, and struggles to keep her secret from her.

programme.title: 60 Days In: Cover Blown
programme.desc: Angele is removed from the program after it's learned that she intentionally broke her cover with inmate Gabrielle. Stephanie fears that Gabrielle will not keep Angele's secret, putting Stephanie in danger.

programme.title: 60 Days In: Get Them Out
programme.desc: With the cover blown on the program, Colonel Adger must work against the clock to safely remove all the participants from the Fulton County Jail.

programme.desc: Kosta Fotopoulos, a member of the Greek community in Daytona, invents a club for killers, and convinces his lover to kill a drifter so she can join.

programme.title: American Justice: Death of a Bride
programme.desc: In September 1999, a New Jersey woman is murdered by her ex-boyfriend on her wedding day.

programme.title: American Justice: Cops on Trial
programme.desc: Police officers and the general public are held to different standards of justice.

programme.title: American Justice: A Deadly Dose
programme.desc: Viewers determine the guilt or innocence of Brian Eftenoff, who is accused of killing his wife.

programme.title: Nightwatch: 105 and Rising
programme.desc: It's a hot and humid night in New Orleans, and as temperatures rise, violence erupts. Police chase two carjacking suspects. Keeley treats an injured young family. Titus and Dan respond to a call from a former Playboy bunny.

programme.title: Nightwatch: Needle in a Haystack
programme.desc: Officers Roni and Cooper find themselves in a breathless foot chase after people are stabbed at a nightclub. Fire rescue's Doug and Stokes desperately try to save the life of a young man shot in his throat. A carjacking leads to a manhunt.

programme.title: Nightwatch: Animal Instinct
programme.desc: Two officers are helped by the K9 Unit to corral a suspect who takes off running after a car chase. Rush and Rutledge struggle to convince a man with heart problems to go to the hospital. A car careens off a bridge and the driver can't be found.

programme.title: Fugitive Chronicles: Darli
programme.desc: An incredible international manhunt ensues when a player in Miami's drug world goes on the lam.

programme.title: Fugitive Chronicles: Danny Ray Horning
programme.desc: Horning goes to the one place he thinks he'll never be found, the Grand Canyon. Living off the land, he evades capture in the longest and largest manhunt in Arizona state history.

programme.title: Female Forces: Cry Me a River
programme.desc: Plenty of tears are shed by suspects and officers; Betsy escorts a war veteran.

programme.title: American Monster: The Green Monster
programme.desc: In rural Ohio, an intruder brutally guns down Jack and Linda Myers in their sleep. The only witness is their sleepy 4-year-old grandson. But their extensive home movies - aired here for the first time - may have captured a monster lurking in their midst.

programme.title: American Monster: Stand by your Men
programme.desc: After moving to a remote town in Colorado, Ron and Cynthia Phillips and their four children try to adjust. But their never-aired home videos mask darker impulses within their family - ones that would lead to a complex web of deceit, infidelity and murder.

programme.title: American Monster: In Sickness and in Health
programme.desc: When outgoing Beth Spaulding meets shy Jason Risenburg it seems that love has conquered loneliness and the two quickly marry. Illness and bad luck push their happiness to the brink, triggering a tornado of lies and deception that tears them apart.

programme.title: American Monster: Smoke Gets in Your Eyes
programme.desc: When a devastating fire at the Kohnle family home leaves a family member dead, it appears to be a tragic accident. As the evidence mounts up, it's the testimony of two young kids who lead the police to decipher if it was an accident, suicide or murder.

programme.title: American Monster: Alabama Murder Mystery
programme.desc: When a man is struck down by a mysterious sickness, the entire town grieves but when his daughter also falls ill, the family becomes suspicious.

programme.title: The Night That Didn't End: A Mother's Love
programme.desc: In the suburbs of Atlanta, Georgia, a pregnant mother and her fiancé are kidnapped on the night before their baby shower. When the fiancé's family receives ransom calls shortly after, there's no mistake that the couple's lives are hanging by a thread.

programme.title: Stranger Among Us: Horror on the Homestead
programme.desc: When three respected members of a tight-knit community of award-winning Christmas tree farmers are brutally gunned down, terrified locals fear that a cold-blooded killer has been living among them for years.

programme.title: Dead of Winter: As He Lay Frozen
programme.desc: On a freezing Minnesota night, a ruthless shooting leaves a young police officer fighting for his life by the roadside. As his wife awaits his fate, a heart-stopping manhunt ensues. As the killers escape, officers don't know who they'll strike next.

programme.title: The Night That Didn't End: A Mother's Love
programme.desc: In the suburbs of Atlanta, Georgia, a pregnant mother and her fiancé are kidnapped on the night before their baby shower. When the fiancé's family receives ransom calls shortly after, there's no mistake that the couple's lives are hanging by a thread.

programme.title: Stranger Among Us: Horror on the Homestead
programme.desc: When three respected members of a tight-knit community of award-winning Christmas tree farmers are brutally gunned down, terrified locals fear that a cold-blooded killer has been living among them for years.

programme.title: Dead of Winter: As He Lay Frozen
programme.desc: On a freezing Minnesota night, a ruthless shooting leaves a young police officer fighting for his life by the roadside. As his wife awaits his fate, a heart-stopping manhunt ensues. As the killers escape, officers don't know who they'll strike next.

programme.title: American Monster: Alabama Murder Mystery
programme.desc: When a man is struck down by a mysterious sickness, the entire town grieves but when his daughter also falls ill, the family becomes suspicious.

programme.title: The Killer Closer: Roadside Homicide
programme.desc: Detective Lindy Gligorijevic investigates the death of a young woman whose body is found in the backseat of her burnt-out car. Detective Lindy pieces together the victim's last hours and identifies the suspect, only to learn he is on the run.

programme.title: Murder Chose Me: The Passenger
programme.desc: A 911 dispatcher is found slumped behind the wheel of a wrecked sedan with a bullet through his torso. To catch the killer, Demery must retrace the victim's final steps and untangle a web of accusation and innuendo spun by a shady cast of characters.

programme.title: Murder Chose Me: Snake Eyes
programme.desc: The lifeless body of an unidentified woman is found in the parking lot of an abandoned factory. Detective Rod Demery is assigned to the case, but he's thrown a curveball when he recognizes the face of the victim at the center of the crime scene.

programme.title: Murder Chose Me: Friendly Fire
programme.desc: An abandoned car belonging to missing sailor Nicholas Cox turns up in a parking lot. Inside, Demery uncovers a grisly cache of blood evidence, but no Cox. In order to find justice for his fallen brother-in-arms, Demery must first locate his body.

programme.title: Murder Chose Me: The Yellow House on Kent Street
programme.desc: Officers find a body slumped behind the wheel of a wrecked SUV. But the driver wasn't killed in the crash he was shot in the abdomen. When Demery connects the case to a pair of alarmingly similar murders, he realizes there's a serial killer on the loose.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: Stacy's Story
programme.desc: A mother finds her teenage daughter savagely murdered inside their own home. A few drops of blood discovered decades later may be the key to solving the tragic mystery.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: Unfinished Journey
programme.desc: A young woman about to start a Hollywood career mysteriously disappears off Interstate 10.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: Buried Dreams
programme.desc: A mother's relentless investigation of her daughter's disappearance leads police to a terrifying string of murders.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Not My Boy
programme.desc: George and Margaret Keller never suspected that the man terrorizing their city could be a member of their own family. As it dawns on them that their son is hiding a sinister secret, they must decide whether or not to turn him in.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: First Love, Forever Evil
programme.desc: Melissa Holland was certain that her high school boyfriend, Michael Overstreet, was the man she'd always dreamed of. But only after they were married did she begin to realize that her determination to live happily ever after had put her in mortal danger.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Deadly Fetish
programme.desc: When Debra Davis's husband accused her of being cold and immature for refusing to experiment sexually, she thought something was wrong with her. She never suspected her husband's perversions were signs that there was something evil deep within him.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: I Tried to Prevent This
programme.desc: For 17 years, Kathy Swanson feared her son, Michael, would one day harm someone. For 17 years, she tried in vain to convince people that something about Michael was different until that dreadful day finally came that her worst nightmare came true.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Civil War
programme.desc: From a secret society that gathers in the dead of night and plots the assassination of Abraham Lincoln, to U.S. spymaster Alan Pinkerton who stops Confederate agents, the outcome of the Civil War is often decided by spies.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Gold
programme.desc: A look at the history of gold, where most of it resides today and who owns it.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Code Wars
programme.desc: American code breakers have given the United States an edge in every conflict in American history. Now, with encryption available for technological devices, U.S. code warriors have a new obstacle to manuever in exposing their enemies.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: Cold War in Space
programme.desc: July 21st, 1969 saw one of the iconic events of the 20th century when the Apollo 10 crew set foot on the moon. However, some claim the moon landings were faked. A hacker claims to have found evidence of a U.S. space fleet fueled by alien technology.

programme.title: Patriots Rising: The American Revolution: Rise of the Patriots
programme.desc: Five unsung patriots strike pivotal blows for American liberty as unrest between Britain and the colonies explodes into a war for independence.

programme.title: Patriots Rising: The American Revolution: The Empire Fights Back
programme.desc: Time after time, American independence seems like a lost cause as George Washington's Continental Army teeters on the brink of annihilation. The heroics of five little-known patriots help the colonies live to fight another day.

programme.title: Patriots Rising: The American Revolution: Return of the Rebels
programme.desc: The American Revolution seems doomed as the British army launches a bold new campaign in the south, but five unsung patriots help reverse the course of the war and shock the world.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: The Lockerbie Plot
programme.desc: An inquiry into whether Iran was really behind the Lockerbie Bombing, if the CIA invented and promoted suicide bombing in the Middle East, why there were no photos of Bin Laden's body and if 9/11 was actually an inside job.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Civil War

programme.title: Blood and Fury: America's Civil War: Battle of Petersburg
programme.desc: The Union invasion of the south has ground to a halt at the seemingly impregnable ring of trenches built around Petersburg, Virginia. After eight bloody attempts to storm them have failed, two officers from Vermont will lead a daring raid.

programme.title: Blood and Fury: America's Civil War: Battle of Gettysburg
programme.desc: An elite band of Yankee Sharpshooters must stop Robert E. Lee's Alabamian shock troops from flanking the Union line and winning the battle of Gettysburg and perhaps the entire Civil War.

programme.title: Blood and Fury: America's Civil War: Battle of Nashville
programme.desc: In a daring attempt to regain the upper hand in the Civil War, Confederate forces try to retake the city of Nashville and sever the supply line that's feeding the Union invasion of the south.

programme.title: Blood and Fury: America's Civil War: Battle of Fredericksburg
programme.desc: Following the strategic Union win at Antietam, Federal forces clash with a massive rebel army in the town of Fredericksburg, Virginia in what will become the largest fight of the Civil War.

programme.title: Blood and Fury: America's Civil War: Battle of Antietam
programme.desc: Following a string of victories in Virginia, General Robert E. Lee brings his Army north in a bold attempt to end the Civil War and win Southern Independence.

programme.title: Blood and Fury: America's Civil War: Battle of Bull Run
programme.desc: In what will be the first real battle of the Civil War, untested and poorly trained Rebel and Confederate troops clash on the blood-soaked banks of the Bull Run River.

programme.title: Gunslingers: Bat Masterson: Defender of Dodge
programme.desc: This well-dressed gunfighter was a gambler, a hunter, an Indian fighter, and a scout; but above all else, Bat Masterson was a lawman. As Sheriff of Ford County, Kansas, Bat Masterson kept the peace on the volatile Frontier.

programme.title: Gunslingers: Butch Cassidy: The Perfect Criminal
programme.desc: Until the day he died, whenever that was, nobody ever outsmarted Butch Cassidy. He always got away. Cassidy was an outlaw who lived more by his wits than by his gun.

programme.title: Natural Born Outlaws: Machine Gun Kelly
programme.desc: George Francis Barnes J, better known as 'Machine Gun Kelly,' was an Irish American gangster during the Prohibition era. His nickname came from his favourite weapon, a Thompson submachine gun.

programme.title: Natural Born Outlaws: Al Capone
programme.desc: Al Capone is America's best known gangster and perhaps the single greatest symbol of the collapse of law and order in the United States during the Prohibition era of the 1920s. The FBI branded the bootlegging kingpin America's 'Public Enemy #1.'

programme.desc: Tamara Day transforms a bedroom as she continues renovating an 1897 bungalow. Knowing modern buyers expect a master suite, Tamara annexes a second room to enlarge the tiny closet and add a bathroom.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Move That Kitchen
programme.desc: Tamara renovates a single-story ranch and tackles her biggest challenge to date, transforming the former master bedroom into a stunning, open kitchen. However, she and her dad run into problems during demolition.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Copper Showstopper
programme.desc: Tamara continues renovations on the ranch by creating a new master suite. While polishing the copper fireplace hood, Tamara and her dad use a familiar solution that has unusual results. Her plans to create a sunroom run into problems due to weather.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Fireplaces and Wired Spaces
programme.desc: Tamara annexes an oversized dining room to enlarge a tiny kitchen in a 1926 English Tudor. She rips out an outdated and tacky mantel to create a stunning fireplace surround, and then creates a large desktop for an in-home office.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Two-deck Tudor
programme.desc: Tamara struggles to create a more spacious master suite until she decides to add a second deck to a 1926 English Tudor. In the backyard, she adds an outdoor living area with a fire pit. She and her dad then realize the garage doors may cause a problem.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Ho-Ho-Home!
programme.desc: Doug, aka Santa, and his wife Lois inherited a 1,250-square-foot cabin that's been in her family since 1958. With no major renovations since the 1970s, Chase and the team are excited to perform a Christmas miracle and transform this cabin.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Dream Come True
programme.desc: A couple with five children calls on the Cabin Masters to take their newly purchased camp on David Pond and turn it into a family vacation cabin that will serve as a central part of their lives for generations to come.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Call of The Loon
programme.desc: Sitting on the shores of Moosehead Lake, the cabin known as the 'Call of The Loon' has been reacquired by the original builder's great-granddaughter. Chase and the team update the amenities and add a second story to accommodate the large family.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Taking It to the Finish Line
programme.desc: Chase and the team are hired to finish a cabin for a homeowner that's been collecting materials for years but just hasn't been able to finish the project.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Rebuilding The Old Schoolhouse
programme.desc: Chase Morrill and his team of Cabin Masters hike through the woods of Dedham, ME, to restore a dilapidated family camp that was once the old schoolhouse. A serious case of rot threatens to close down the entire project.

programme.desc: Wes Borland and Carre Callaway explore the run-down Detroit mansion they purchased sight unseen. The amount of work they need to do to this house is overwhelming. They start off their renovations with the master suite.

programme.title: Paid Program

programme.title: Mega Decks: A Four-Season Party Deck for a Large Family
programme.desc: John and Bonnie have a very large family and a very small deck. And with their six adult children living nearby, they really want a place for the family to gather. So, they've decided to turn their old deck into the ultimate party deck.

programme.title: Mega Decks: A Modern, Zen Oasis With A Rustic Escape
programme.desc: The Mega Deck team has to turn a sunroom, concrete patio, and dirt landing by the pond into one cohesive space. After tearing out the sunroom, they build a steel framed deck with a flat roof that's connected to the existing patio.

programme.title: Mega Decks: Building Bigger In Texas
programme.desc: Garth travels to the Lone Star State to build its first mega deck. Garth unifies a disjointed patio, doubling the floor space and quadrupling the covered living area. The $325,000 deck is finished with fire pits, a swim spa and a mesquite bar top.

programme.title: Mega Decks: All-New Deck For Repeat Client
programme.desc: A former Mega Decks customer buys a new house and needs a new deck. Find out if Andy and the build crew can live up to the client's heightened expectations and deliver a second mega deck that beats the first.

programme.title: Mega Decks: A Mountain Retreat with a Rocky View
programme.desc: The team contends with nearly impassable roads, mountain weather and a build site on top a granite boulder.

programme.title: Mega Decks: A Luxury Deck with a Dog Staircase
programme.desc: Newlyweds Whitney and Joey have just purchased their dream home in an exclusive gated community, but the existing deck has some serious issues. It's old, rotting and doesn't fit their needs. Plus, their aging dog is having trouble using the stairs.

programme.title: Mega Decks: Snake River Showpiece
programme.desc: Garth and his team brave sub-freezing temperatures in Idaho to build a $590k multi-level deck with four distinct living areas. The indoor-outdoor space features a pizza oven, a mezzanine-level bar overlooking the Snake River and an infrared sauna.

programme.title: Mega Decks: A Spacious Retreat With Artistic Details
programme.desc: The Mega team overhauls an ugly, exposed and downright dangerous deck disaster. They face challenging weather, rotting wood and even an infestation while transforming two separate and unusable spaces into a sprawling, year-round retreat.

programme.title: Mega Decks: Southern Plantation-Style Deck
programme.desc: A couple wants to add a deck to their home in Louisiana. The current deck is rotting and offers no protection from the heat or insect, so Garth's plantation-style design includes enclosed rooms and air conditioning.

programme.title: Mega Decks: A Family Fun Deck With Plenty of Features
programme.desc: A 1970s-era sunroom and a small deck are taken down to create one space where a family can cook, eat, entertain, and stay warm. The finished project features a two-sided fireplace, water features, and custom privacy.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Backyard Beauty
programme.desc: Being close to the water in South Bethany, Delaware means unwanted wear and tear on Jay and Christine's back deck. They enlist Marnie to update and renovate the space.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Seaside Spectacular
programme.desc: A family living in their dream location of Bethany Beach, DE, calls on Marnie to save their cramped 1980s beach house. Marnie's mission is to drag it into the present with a nautical makeover and make it look as beautiful as the beaches around it.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Big Beach Dreams
programme.desc: Marnie's friend Leslie has achieved her dream of buying a beautiful house on the beach, but it needs a lot of work. Now she needs Marnie's help to turn it into the beach home and entertaining hub she's always dreamed about.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Flood-Ridden to Fabulous
programme.desc: Due to the layout of their property, Tom and Kim's spacious backyard gets overrun by flooding during thunderstorms. They enlist Marnie to make the yard flood-proof and transform the impractical space into an outdoor living area.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: From Soaked to Saved
programme.desc: A couple has invested in a 50-year-old abandoned home in Dewey Beach, Delaware. They decide to hand the reins over to Marnie in the hopes she'll turn the fixer-upper into a safe vacation destination for their two boys.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Pie-shaped Problem House
programme.desc: A couple loves to host family at their home in Dewey Beach, DE, but no one wants to stay in their tiny, awkwardly shaped guest house. With a limited budget, Marnie gets creative and bold with her design choices to transform the house.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Beauty and the Beach
programme.desc: A townhouse overlooking Bethany Beach is dated and awkward. Marnie attempts to update the home, but the discovery of water damage may affect her ability to make the most of its dazzling view.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Sun Room to Fun Room
programme.desc: After years of pleading from their daughters, this couple has agreed to renovate their 90s themed house. Now it's up to Marnie to bring their house into the 21st century and make it comfortable enough for three generations.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Local Legends
programme.desc: From sandwiches to desserts, Noah discovers foods that put cities on the map and some that present an entire state.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Tons of Taters
programme.desc: Ingenious fair vendors use the humble potato to create some amazing and original midway food.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: There's Something About Cherry
programme.desc: Noah Cappe arrives in Macon, Georgia, for the International Cherry Blossom Festival and some of the prettiest, pinkest carnival treats around.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Seoul Dip Sisters
programme.desc: Noah Cappe gets festive at the California Mid-Winter Fair and Fiesta! He's sampling the Seoul Dip- a Korean twist on the French Dip- then keeps things spicy with the Diablo Dog before going for a sweet finish with the Supreme Samoa doughnut stack.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Hoboken, New Jersey
programme.desc: Casey Webb's appetizing adventures take him to Hoboken, New Jersey, New York's neighbor to the west and the home of the great Frank Sinatra. He munches on homemade mozzarella and takes a bite out of a bagel behemoth.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Maui, Hi
programme.desc: Casey Webb travels to Hawaii, where he embraces the aloha spirit and takes on a whopping three-and-a-half-pound burger.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Austin, Texas
programme.desc: Casey Webb's appetizing trek across America brings him to Austin, TX. He starts with a 2-pound barbecue behemoth packed with every meat, sauce and side on the menu.

programme.title: Man v. Food Nation: Burlington, VT
programme.desc: Casey Webb travels to the small town of Burlington, Vermont, for some mammoth eats, including a beer-infused bagel feast and a 3.5-pound breakfast sandwich challenge.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: I'll Have What They're Having
programme.desc: Antonia Lofaso falls in love with a sourdough cinnamon roll in Los Angeles.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: One of a Kind
programme.desc: We're talking about dishes that are unique, original and unlike anything that's come before. Alton Brown has his eye- and his stomach- set on a genuine creation called the Crab Rangoon Pizza.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: More Than I Can Count!
programme.desc: Some special dishes are so good you can enjoy them over and over again. Andrew Zimmern has lost count of how many times he's indulged in the infamous barbecue chicken from Miss Myra's Pit Bar-B-Que in Birmingham, Ala.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Desert Island Dish
programme.desc: Mayday! Mayday! The chefs and foodies are stranded on a desert island with nothing but an appetite, and they're sharing the one dish they simply can't live without.

programme.title: Good Eats: Immersion Therapy
programme.desc: The last decade has seen a lot of change in the food world, but no device has made more of a difference than the immersion circulator. Alton Brown makes an argument for having one in every kitchen by featuring dishes such as perfect rump roast.

programme.title: Good Eats: American Classics X: Chicken Parm
programme.desc: Alton Brown makes the argument that Italian food was actually invented in America, and that chicken parmesan is the dish where it all began. Yet, an Italian canned tomato makes it all possible.

programme.title: Good Eats: Stew Romance
programme.desc: Alton Brown orchestrates the perfect stew.

programme.title: Good Eats: Apple of My Pie
programme.desc: Host Alton Brown makes everybody's favourite: apple pie.

programme.title: Food's Greatest Hits: Mambo Italiano

programme.title: Food's Greatest Hits: Super Sandwiches

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Hot Deals in the Desert

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Filling Up In Florida

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Sweet Deals Down South

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Eatin' Ok in the Okc
