programme.desc: A woman meets the perfect man to launch her modeling career, but is soon faced with a brutal reality. A beautiful farm girl moves to the city to pursue her modeling dreams, but winds up living a nightmare.

programme.title: Model Killers: Reality Kills
programme.desc: Three passionate, attractive men - and some very adoring fans - lust after a swimsuit model with a heart of gold.

programme.title: Model Killers: Model Murderer/ Strangled Beauty
programme.desc: An ambitious male model with a physique to die for is about to become an international sensation -- but not in a way he could have foreseen.

programme.title: Grace vs. Abrams
programme.desc: Nancy Grace and Dan Abrams debate infamous crimes and legal cases.

programme.title: See No Evil: On Her Watch
programme.desc: On March 18th, 2011, 32-year-old Patty Ayala is murdered at the Burger King where she works. Police find the safe open and a mysterious message next to Patty's body. They turn to surveillance video - and it's there the killer emerges from the shadows.

programme.title: See No Evil: The Doctor Will See You
programme.desc: Devoted family man Dr. David Cornbleet is brutally killed in his office. His daughter finds him, bound and gagged, in a pool of blood. Police must rely on CCTV images of man with a concealed face to lead them to David's killer in this twisted tale.

programme.title: See No Evil: Eye in the Sky
programme.desc: When 27-year-old Christie Wilson disappears after a night at the local casino, surveillance cameras reveal her gambling with a mysterious man. Can this video footage unlock the secrets of what happened next and help bring her home alive?

programme.title: See No Evil: All Eyes on Jordie
programme.desc: On April 10th 2016, Jordie Hudson vanishes after a night out with friends. The only clue police have is her glasses, which are discovered in a pool of blood. Surveillance footage shows a horrific attack.

programme.title: See No Evil: No Good Deed
programme.desc: On September 28th 2014, Diane Cunningham is bludgeoned to death in her bedroom. The only clues are receipts from Walmart, a ferry crossing, and a casino. Security footage reveals a prime suspect with a motive, but not everything is quite as it seems.

programme.title: Body Cam: In the Crosshairs
programme.desc: Arkansas officers are pinned down by a deadly gunman for four hours. Then, in Oklahoma City, officers fear an ambush when a suspect bails from a stolen pick-up truck.

programme.title: Body Cam: Code 30
programme.desc: In New York state, a domestic disturbance takes a violent turn which changes a police chief's life. In Florida an officer chasing 2 suspects is separated from his K9. And in Indiana, an Officer stares down the barrel of a suspect's gun.

programme.title: Suspicion: Murder in the Family
programme.desc: When young Alan Simpson goes missing in April 1985, his mother Brenda is determined to find him. The last person to see him alive is his stepmother Rosalind, who claims he just vanished into thin air. But Brenda will stop at nothing to get to the truth.

programme.title: Obsession: Dark Desires: There's Something About Mary Lynn

programme.title: Obsession: Dark Desires: Hiding in Plain Sight

programme.title: Obsession: Dark Desires: Number One Fan

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: A Killer Always Rings Twice

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Chance Encounter

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Secret Life
programme.desc: After Lourdes Riddle is found strangled to death in the trunk of her car, detective Joe Kenda follows a twisting maze of military and cultural secrets.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: My First Case
programme.desc: In his first case with the homicide unit, rookie burglary detective Joe Kenda volunteers to work a bloody multi-victim shooting deemed 'unsolvable' by the veterans. But has the ambitious young investigator bitten off more than he can chew?

programme.title: Hitler's Executioner
programme.desc: The story of Johann Reichhart, the man who went from German state executioner before WW2 to head up a merciless Nazi killing machine which murdered thousands. In a bizarre twist of fate, Reichhart ended up working for the Allies.

programme.title: Hitler's Messiah Complex
programme.desc: Discover how a series of psychotic episodes in his early life convinced Adolf Hitler that he was a modern day Pharaoh.

programme.title: FBI Takedowns: Kill Shot
programme.desc: The FBI is quickly running out of options to save a woman and her toddler from a kidnapper hell bent on murder. To get them out alive, an ingenious plan challenges the elite Hostage Rescue Team to lure the suspect into a sniper's crosshairs.

programme.title: FBI Takedowns: Hunting a Lone Wolf
programme.desc: The FBI's in a race against time once an IED is discovered along a Spokane, WA parade route. It's a hunt that will take them all across the Pacific Northwest for a lone wolf suspect before he tries to strike again.

programme.title: FBI Takedowns: Terrorist in Texas
programme.desc: The FBI's Joint Terrorism Task Force in Dallas, TX goes undercover to stop a homegrown terrorist from killing thousands of Americans. To neutralize this violent jihadist, the FBI will have to build a weapon of mass destruction of its own design.

programme.title: FBI Takedowns: The Boston Bandits
programme.desc: Up against an impenetrable code of silence in one of Boston's toughest neighbourhoods, a special FBI Task Force faces one of its toughest challenges yet, taking down a crew of professional robbers who've proven they're willing to kill.

programme.title: FBI Takedowns: Catching Crazy
programme.desc: A cop-shooting fugitive terrorizes banks in South Jersey. To smoke him out, the FBI teams with a local detective and an ex-cop informant. Even with the perfect trap, this crazy criminal isn't about to go down without a fight.

programme.title: FBI Takedowns: Sadistic Mastermind
programme.desc: A sadistic criminal mastermind forces his victims to make a cruel choice: rob a bank or watch their family die. The FBI will need to take extraordinary measures to bringing this villain down before a chilling prophecy is fulfilled.

programme.title: FBI Takedowns: The Boston Bandits
programme.desc: Up against an impenetrable code of silence in one of Boston's toughest neighbourhoods, a special FBI Task Force faces one of its toughest challenges yet, taking down a crew of professional robbers who've proven they're willing to kill.

programme.title: FBI Takedowns: Kill Shot
programme.desc: The FBI is quickly running out of options to save a woman and her toddler from a kidnapper hell bent on murder. To get them out alive, an ingenious plan challenges the elite Hostage Rescue Team to lure the suspect into a sniper's crosshairs.

programme.title: Hardcore Heroes: Soaring to New Heights
programme.desc: Test pilot Joe Kittinger volunteers to be the first man to parachute jump from the edge of space, and Air Force researcher Dr. John Stapp straps himself into rocket sleds to test the limits of human endurance.

programme.title: Hardcore Heroes: Warriors on the Frontlines
programme.desc: During the Vietnam War, Drew Dix and a small handful of soldiers liberate an entire city from an enemy battalion. Russian soldier Viktor Leonov vanquishes German forces in the Arctic battlegrounds of World War 2.

programme.title: Hardcore Heroes: Battling the Elements
programme.desc: Firefighter Jack Pritchard fearlessly charges into blazing infernos to rescue victims, and when Hurricane Katrina pounded New Orleans, John Keller stepped up to save residents of his apartment building.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: Designed for Power
programme.desc: Hitler's mastery of propaganda, and instinct for effective design, used to create everything from the swastika flag to the striking uniforms of the storm troopers, help win huge support for the Nazi party, a vital step in its march towards total power.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: Hitler's Highways
programme.desc: Hitler promises to make Germany great again by creating 14,000 miles of freeway and building one and half million 'People's Cars' every year. Instead, the Nazi war economy relies on millions of forced labourers and prisoners.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: The Industry of War
programme.desc: Hitler is determined to rebuild Germany's military strength after the destruction of almost all its weaponry in the First World War. To overcome his country's dire shortage of raw materials, he plans to steal them from other countries.

programme.title: Hitler's Zombie Army
programme.desc: Truth is revealed of the Allied 'monument men' discovery in 1945 of rotting corpses of Germanic heroes. A world of magic, high priests and secret castles is exposed.

programme.title: WWII: Masters of War: Winston Churchill
programme.desc: May 28, 1940, while the Wehrmacht crushes the allied armies in France, British officials prepare to face Hitler.

programme.title: WWII: Masters of War: Adolf Hitler
programme.desc: On June 22, 1941, Adolf Hitler launches the largest military offensive in history against the Soviet Union: Operation Barbarossa. Blinded by his fire power, Hitler signs his death sentence.

programme.title: WWII: Masters of War: Franklin D. Roosevelt
programme.desc: Japanese bombers attack Pearl Harbor and sink a large part of the US Pacific Fleet. President Franklin D. Roosevelt decides it's time for the United States to strike back.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Amazing A-Frame
programme.desc: A couple turns to Marnie to help them transform their shabby A-frame retreat into a beautiful family beach home.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Big Family, Bigger Beach Home
programme.desc: A couple's Dewey Beach home has become cramped and in need of reconfiguration. With a new open-concept layout, Marnie aims to preserve the integrity of the house while improving the flow and maximizing space.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Bethany Beach Bunks
programme.desc: A family with a new baby is bursting out of their cramped bungalow in Bethany Beach, Delaware. Marnie creates more space for the family by opening up the kitchen, relocating a laundry room and building magical bunk beds to accommodate the children.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Bethany Beach
programme.desc: Jim and Tina have purchased a 1930s beach cottage in Bethany Beach, Delaware for their family. The house has a few charming touches, but a lot of aesthetic and structural issues.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Blown-out Beach House
programme.desc: A family with many fond memories of summer vacations in their Lewes, Delaware, beach house finds that their cottage's awkward layout isn't working. The space is maximized by vaulting the ceiling as well as adding an open-concept ground floor.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: The Beach Gut
programme.desc: A couple transports a 60-year-old house to a plot of land near the beach in the hopes it can be transformed into the perfect beach getaway. Marnie must renovate the home while keeping its rustic charm from the 1960s.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: A House Built on Sand
programme.desc: A couple's beach cottage in Dewey, Delaware, is just a few steps to the beach, but the house has no curb appeal and feels dated. They enlist Marnie to give it a face lift, but during demolition, Marnie finds that the foundation is sinking into the sand.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Save It or Sell It
programme.desc: A couple loves Lewes and the cheerful home they own there, but their two daughters have outgrown the space. Now, the family's torn between selling the house or renovating it. Marnie tries to expand the home without losing its historic charm.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Dakota A-Frame
programme.desc: Jared 'Cappie' Capp showcases the luxury of off-grid living by building a modern home in the Black Hills of South Dakota. This stunning all-solar-powered abode will have a wood-burning fireplace, gourmet kitchen and a 400-square-foot loft.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Cascade Mountain Escape
programme.desc: A couple builds their 2400-square-foot dream cabin in the Cascade Mountains of Washington State.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Floating Castle
programme.desc: Marine scientists in Florida hire engineers Nicolas Derouin and Arnaud Luguet to create a first-of-its-kind floating home. They have nine months to complete it, but unpredictable weather and building hiccups may sink this project before it can swim.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Tiny House on a Lake
programme.desc: The Busbys have been living off-the-grid for two years already and want to take it to the next level. They build a super-efficient tiny house in northwestern Montana. Surrounded by stunning views, they'll build it all by hand.

programme.title: Tiny House, Big Living: Model's Tiny Dream House
programme.desc: A model from Boston is heading west to LA to further his career in the fashion industry, so he builds a tiny home that is every bit as fashionable as he is.

programme.title: Tiny House, Big Living: Family of Five's Tiny House
programme.desc: With the help of a builder, a family of five in Oklahoma gets creative to fit comfortably into a tiny home. The home's features include nesting beds, a staircase with drawers and a closet door serving as a room divider.

programme.title: Tiny House, Big Living: Tiny Pool House
programme.desc: A family of four moves into a pool house just outside of Oklahoma City. The modern space comes complete with a custom homework area, a nesting bed, a fire pit that doubles as a table and shower for summer days by the pool.

programme.title: Tiny House, Big Living: Ingenious Mini House
programme.desc: A medical student is tired of renting and isn't sure where her residency will take her, so she's building a tiny house that matches her resourceful personality.

programme.title: Tiny House, Big Living: Traveling Nurses' Mobile Abode
programme.desc: Traveling nurses want to finish their tiny home build before their next assignment. The couple must work around the clock to complete the anything-but-ordinary home with its bright blue exterior, giant bedroom and built-in snake cage.

programme.title: Tiny House, Big Living: Techie's Tiny Home
programme.desc: A Texas tech guru brings his work home by incorporating cutting-edge technology into his tiny house. The high-tech abode features a biometric security system and a hidden computer that allows him to adjust the lighting, appliances and windows.

programme.title: Tiny House, Big Living: Tiny Traveling Theatre
programme.desc: A pair of young traveling actors build the perfect tiny home for life on the road. Their vision includes a storage loft that doubles as a reading nook, a convertible sofa and a pullout stage with a trapdoor.

programme.title: Tiny House, Big Living: Artists' Nautical-fantasy Tiny House
programme.desc: After moving in with parents to save for medical school, high school sweethearts are ready for their own one-of-a-kind space for their family of four.

programme.title: Tiny House, Big Living: Tiny Woodsy Abode
programme.desc: New York newlyweds hire builders to turn a gooseneck trailer into a 350-square-foot rustic tiny home in the woods of Vermont.

programme.title: Tiny House, Big Living: Globetrotters' Tiny House
programme.desc: Globetrotting newlyweds have been adventuring since the day they met and now want a tiny home base for in between travels.

programme.title: Tiny House, Big Living: Tiny Adventure Bus
programme.desc: A husband and wife are raising the roof on a school bus to make a tiny home perfect for traveling the country.

programme.title: Tiny House, Big Living: Tiny Home, Big Adventures
programme.desc: High school sweethearts are ready to take time to focus on themselves, travel the country and live the minimalist lifestyle in a tiny home of their own. They customize their 304-square-foot dream home with a wood stove, bed and full-size shower.

programme.title: Big Texas Fix: The Pink Shack
programme.desc: Michael and Ashley have their work cut out for them while restoring a dilapidated 1914 fixer-upper. They create a light-filled breakfast nook and repurpose a vintage wooden sign to transform a quaint pink corner house.

programme.title: Big Texas Fix: Tiny Craftsman
programme.desc: Michael and Ashley revisit a house they tried to purchase a year ago and find the small 1920s craftsman has been stripped of all its original features.

programme.title: Big Texas Fix: Dream House
programme.desc: Michael and Ashley stumble upon a pre-1900s Victorian after some curbside dumpster diving. They hit New Orleans for some perfect vintage decor then return to combine two rooms into one spacious kitchen and make this the dream house worth of the name.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Rib-a-Licious
programme.desc: Roger's on the hunt for lip-smacking barbecue ribs and he found two places where the racks of meat stack up to perfection.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Holy Smokes!
programme.desc: Roger attends the 100 year anniversary of the St. Mary Magdalene Church Picnic in Owensboro, Kentucky. Several thousand pounds of meat will cook over 100 feet of fire and smoke.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Three-Alarm Fire
programme.desc: Roger visits Faith's Farm in Bonfield, IL for an awesome feast cooked on three different fiery contraptions.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Grillin' and Smokin'
programme.desc: Roger is grilling steaks and chickens in California, and smoking a bounty of seafood in Illinois. High heat for meat and low smoke for seafood.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Hamburgers
programme.desc: The deceptively simple ground meat served on a bun with the perfect combo of condiments and garnishes.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Saucy
programme.desc: Roger Mooking scours the U.S. to find 15 of the best dishes that are all about the sauce. There's sticky toffee pudding, super spicy wings, a fondue burger, drunken scallops and even chocolate plus barbecue.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Sweet and Savory
programme.desc: Scott Conant shows Michael his favourite burger and brew bar in an out-of-the-way corner of New Orleans, and then in Kansas City, Michael learns how two brother have stormed the classic barbecue scene with their award winning smoked meat.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Super Chefs' Favorite Foods
programme.desc: Earl Campbell and Michael dig into juicy brisket and warm peach cobbler at Texas' most famous barbecue restaurants.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Smoked, Stuffed and Smothered
programme.desc: In San Diego, Michael Symon devours a delicious dumpling-inspired pork and shrimp burger and an elevated pub food classic. In Shreveport, La., a wood-fired pizza is topped with spicy roast chicken and sweet corn.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Scary Good Smoked Meat
programme.desc: In San Diego, Michael Symon chows down on fish tacos with housemade blue corn tortillas and a meaty Mexican pizza. In Denver, a local Colorado lamb patty is a remake of a traditional Hawaiian hangover cure, the Loco Moco.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Billings, MT

programme.desc: The pups get trained by a puppyball expert for the puppyball championship. Hedgie helps the pups catch the veggie bandit in Bob's vegetable patch.

programme.desc: When Chloe's new puppy, Keia, runs away, the pups must find her before Chloe returns! When Chloe wishes she could have a unicorn, Bingo, Rolly and Keia set out to find one.

programme.desc: The PJ Masks meet Armadylan and think he is a superhero like them. Owlette is accidentally turned invisible!

programme.desc: When the Muppet Babies think Miss Nanny has been captured by a dragon, they set off to rescue her! During an imaginary flight to Paris, no one will let Animal take the wheel!

programme.title: Muppet Babies: Kermit's Big Show / The Card Shark

programme.desc: Mickey and the gang participate in high-spirited races around the globe.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Prince Pete's Catnap
programme.desc: The Clubhouse pals discover what has been keeping Prince Pete awake, after trying hard to help him fall asleep for a nap. It was a stack of peas under the cushion of his favourite car.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Pluto Lends a Paw

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Mickey's Handy Helpers
programme.desc: When the Handy Helpers go limp, Mickey discovers the Clubhouse machine is broken.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Sleeping Minnie

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Minnie's Mouseke-Calendar

programme.desc: Mickey's Rainbow Color Machine runs out of color, which starts to cause a problem.

programme.title: Gigantosaurus: Air Archie / The Imitator

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Super-Charged: Pop Star Helpers/ The Chip 'N Dale 500
programme.desc: The Happy Helpers are hired to get pop star Nina Glitter to her show on time. Chip and Dale shrink everyone down to their size.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Super-charged: Two Close Friends / Mr. Bigby's Big Night

programme.title: Fairly OddParents

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: One Man Banned/ Frenemy Mine
programme.desc: After Timmy's rejected from the school band, he wishes everyone would love his music. Timmy saves Vicky from a horrible accident.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: The Music Box/ Special Delivery
programme.desc: Theodore gives the Principal a music box he found in Dave's desk to cheer her up. Theodore's been mistakenly mailed off in a box, so Alvin and Simon have to get him back.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Cat Sitter/ Addicted
programme.desc: Theodore gets stuck taking care of Miss Croner's cats during the week. Dave wants the boys to focus only on school. The Chipettes challenge the Chipmunks to go three hours without their favorite things.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks
programme.desc: Superstars Alvin, Simon and Theodore take a roller coaster ride of music and laughter.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Lame Ducks/ Perfect Nightmare

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Fairy Con/ The Hungry Games

programme.title: The Loud House: Exchange of Heart/ Community Disservice
programme.desc: Clyde arranges for an exchange student to stay with them; Lola takes a timid classmate under her wing.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Allergic Reaction/ Lice-enced to Teach

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: SpongeBob, You're Fired!

programme.desc: Pearl gets a job to be cool like her friends, but the only store that's hiring is the lamest store at the mall. SpongeBob loses the use of his thumbs, and must get them back in working order before his entire life falls apart.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Sold!/ Lame and Fortune

programme.title: Amphibia: Toad Tax/ Prison Break
programme.desc: Anne befriends toad soldiers to gain respect in Wartwood, but must choose between her new respect and her frog family. Far from Wartwood, Anne’s friend Sasha is captured by toads.

programme.title: Indivisible With Nate Boyer: New Orleans

programme.title: Indivisible With Nate Boyer: Cleveland
programme.desc: A local restaurateur guides Nate through the resurgent city as he explores a social-minded culinary school and the revitalization of a local high school football field. An exploration of second chances, working class struggle and community policing.

programme.title: Indivisible With Nate Boyer: New York

programme.title: Indivisible With Nate Boyer: Miami
programme.desc: Nate joins a Miami Dolphin to explore police outreach in the community, and dives with military vets to examine an effort to save coral reefs. The long season's journey concludes at the site of Super Bowl LIV.

programme.title: Saturdays in the South: A History of SEC Football: Part Two: 1933-1959
programme.desc: Multiple SEC schools claim national titles from the 1930s through the 1950s. In 1958, LSU won with star running back Billy Cannon leading the way, and a year later Cannon had epic game-winning punt return against powerhouse Ole Miss.

programme.title: Saturdays in the South: A History of SEC Football: Part Six: 1990-1999
programme.desc: The 1990s bring change with expansion and the sport's first-ever conference championship game. Florida's Steve Spurrier fashions an era of high-octane offense, and his Gators form a rivalry with Tennessee and quarterback Peyton Manning.

programme.title: SEC Storied: Shaq & Dale
programme.desc: This film follows former basketball great Shaquille O'Neal as he returns to LSU to visit Dale Brown. The relationship forged between these two men goes back to when Shaq was 13 and since that day they have formed a deep friendship.

programme.title: Maury: My Sick Baby Needs Her Father ... I'll Prove You're Her Dad
programme.desc: Kasey wants to prove to her boyfriend Jordan that he is the father of her five month old daughter. Jordan is only denying their baby because Kasey’s ex-best friend, Chelesa told Jordan that she was sleeping with multiple men.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show: Brawling Blood Lines
programme.desc: Chris hooked up with a manipulative woman named Lynasia and it could cost him dearly. He claims she conned her way into his home and believes that they have a serious relationship.

programme.title: Movie: Lost in America
programme.desc: A successful man, sick and disheartened with corporate America, takes to the road.

programme.title: Movie: Can You Keep a Secret?
programme.desc: A woman on a flight, thinking the plane is about to crash, discloses all her secrets to a seeming stranger, then later finds out the man is actually the CEO of the company she is working for.

programme.title: Movie: Life as We Know It
programme.desc: When their mutual best friends die, two single adults find themselves named as guardians of their friend's orphaned daughter.

programme.title: Movie: Jersey Girl
programme.desc: A young father loses his career and his wife and must raise his daughter alone the best way that he can.

programme.title: Movie: The Object of My Affection
programme.desc: A young woman falls hopelessly in love with her best friend, who is also her gay roommate.

programme.title: Movie: Bye Bye Love

programme.title: Movie: Gulliver's Travels
